kpis.name: CY Projection $
kpis.definition: Current FY projected $ amount by taking YTD Outlook $ + (Future Pipe by Close Ratio) - PQ(Won) + CQ(W+F+UC) + FQ (open pipe * Proj. close ratio)
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY) for PQ(Won) + CQ(W+F+UC) + FQ(open pipe * close ratio) / vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL; time via vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND

components.CQ W+F+UC: Won + Forecast + Upside Committed in current quarter
components.FQ: Future quarter open pipe * projected close ratio

kpis.formulaPbix: YTD Outlook $ + (Future Pipe * Close Ratio) - PQ(Won) + CQ(W+F+UC) + FQ(open pipe * Proj. close ratio)

kpis.name: CY Projection %
kpis.definition: Current FY projected attainment by taking YTD Outlook $ + (Future Pipe by Close Ratio) divided by Quota
kpis.formula: (SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT IN (Won,Forecast,Upside - Committed)) across PQ+CQ+FQ) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL), 0)
kpis.formulaPbix: (PQ(Won) + CQ(W+F+UC) + FQ(open pipe * Proj. close ratio)) / Quota

kpis.name: Attrition $ Outlook
kpis.definition: CQ Attrition Outlook $ value, with Additional risk $ and upside $ as subtext. Updated by RSOM in Elixir.
kpis.formula: Approximated: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ARR_Impact) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0 (Elixir-sourced in PBIX)
kpis.formulaPbix: CQ Attrition Outlook $ (from Elixir); subtext: Additional risk $, upside $
kpis.notes: Elixir-sourced in PBIX; DB approximation uses vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ARR_Impact

kpis.name: Attrition YTD Outlook $
kpis.definition: YTD Attrition Outlook $ as updated by RSOM in Elixir
kpis.formula: Approximated: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ARR_Impact) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND <= 0 AND vw_EBI_Caldate.CLOSE_YR_BKT_NUMBER = 0 (Elixir-sourced in PBIX)
kpis.formulaPbix: Sum of attrition outlook for FY to date
kpis.notes: Elixir-sourced in PBIX; DB approximation uses vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ARR_Impact YTD

kpis.name: Attrition outlook %
kpis.definition: CQ Attrition Outlook as updated by RSOM in Elixir vs CQ Attrition Plan $
kpis.formula: Approximated: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ARR_Impact) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_RENEWALS_TARGET.ATTRITION), 0) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0 (Elixir-sourced in PBIX)
kpis.formulaPbix: Current Qtr Attrition Outlook $ / Current Qtr Attrition Plan $
kpis.notes: Elixir-sourced in PBIX; DB approximation uses ARR_Impact / RENEWALS_TARGET.ATTRITION

kpis.name: Attrition % (with Attrition Vs Plan as subtext)
kpis.definition: % of Lost/downsell $ outlooked (by RSOM in Elixir) vs Plan/QRF for CQ, with $ values as subtext
kpis.formula: Approximated: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ARR_Impact) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_RENEWALS_TARGET.ATTRITION), 0) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0 (Elixir-sourced in PBIX)
kpis.formulaPbix: Current Qtr Attrition Outlook $ / Current Qtr Attrition Plan $
kpis.notes: Elixir-sourced in PBIX; DB approximation uses ARR_Impact / RENEWALS_TARGET.ATTRITION

kpis.name: Forecast
kpis.definition: For reps, Adj Commit = Forecast $ amount in Current Quarter. For Managers, Adj Manager Commit = Forecast $ amount in Current Quarter.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY) WHERE vw_TF_EBI_P2S.ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Forecast' AND vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0
kpis.formulaPbix: Forecast $ in CQ (reps: Adj Commit; Managers: Adj Manager Commit)

kpis.name: GNARR %
kpis.definition: Actual bookings and Outlook for the current quarter expressed as % of Quota/Plan number, $ values as subtext. AE/Manager use Quota; VP uses Plan/QRF.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT IN ('Won','Forecast','Upside - Committed')) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL), 0) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0
kpis.formulaPbix: Current Qtr (W+F+UC)$ / Plan$ (or Quota for AE/Manager)

kpis.name: GNARR H1 %
kpis.definition: Actual bookings and Outlook for Q1 and Q2 of the FY, expressed as % of Quota/Plan for (Q1+Q2)
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT IN ('Won','Forecast','Upside - Committed')) for H1 / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL) for H1, 0)
kpis.formulaPbix: H1 Finish (or W+F+UC) / H1 Plan $

kpis.name: GNARR YTD %
kpis.definition: Actual bookings for prior quarters and Outlook for the current quarter, expressed as % of Quota/Plan for FY. CQ = W+F+UC, PQ = Won.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY) YTD (CQ=W+F+UC, PQ=Won) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL) YTD, 0)
kpis.formulaPbix: Sum of GNARR$ (CQ = W+F+UC, PQ = Won) / Plan or Quota YTD

kpis.name: S3+(F+U) LTG Covx
kpis.definition: Coverage of open pipe (F+UC) compared to LTG quota for CQ. S3+(F+U) = Sum of GNARR S3+ for deals where Adj commitment = Forecast AND Upside.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT IN ('Forecast','Upside - Committed') AND vw_EBI_SALES_STAGE.SalesStageGrp_Sort >= 1) / NULLIF(TARGET_LEFT_TO_GO, 0) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0

components.S3+ F+U: Sum of GNARR S3+ where Adj commitment = Forecast AND Upside (Manager Adj for FLM, SLM, TLM)

kpis.formulaPbix: S3+ (F+U) / TARGET LEFT TO GO $

kpis.name: S5+(F+U) LTG Covx
kpis.definition: Coverage of open S5+ pipe (F+UC) compared to LTG quota for CQ. S5+(F+U) = Sum of GNARR S5+ for deals where Adj commitment = Forecast AND Upside.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT IN ('Forecast','Upside - Committed') AND vw_EBI_SALES_STAGE.SalesStageGrp_Sort = 2) / NULLIF(TARGET_LEFT_TO_GO, 0) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0
kpis.formulaPbix: S5+ (F+U) / TARGET LEFT TO GO $

kpis.name: Upside
kpis.definition: Adj Commit = Upside $ for Reps; Manager Adj Commit = Upside Committed $ for Managers in CQ
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY) WHERE vw_TF_EBI_P2S.ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Upside - Committed' AND vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0
kpis.formulaPbix: Upside $ in CQ

kpis.name: Won
kpis.definition: Won $ amount in CQ
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY) WHERE vw_TF_EBI_P2S.ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Won' AND vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0
kpis.formulaPbix: Sum of opportunity $ where deal closed won in CQ

kpis.name: % FLM Participation QTD
kpis.definition: % of Number of FLMs with >75% Attainment (Curr Qtr Projected Finish) vs Total FLMs. Base: FLM (W+F+UC) / FLM Quota QTD
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.FLM_LDAP WHERE attainment >= 0.75) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.FLM_LDAP), 0); attainment = SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT IN ('Won','Forecast','Upside - Committed')) / SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL)
kpis.formulaPbix: Count of FLMs with >=75% attainment / Total FLMs, where attainment = (W+F+UC) / Quota QTD for CQ

kpis.name: % SLM Participation QTD
kpis.definition: % of Number of SLMs with >75% Attainment (Curr Qtr Projected Finish) vs Total SLMs
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.SLM_LDAP WHERE attainment >= 0.75) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.SLM_LDAP), 0)
kpis.formulaPbix: Count of SLMs with >=75% attainment / Total SLMs

kpis.name: % Participation QTD reps
kpis.definition: % of No. of Reps with >75% Attainment (Curr Qtr Projected Finish) vs Total Active In-place Reps. Base KPI: AE (W+F+UC) / AE Quota QTD for CQ
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.REP_LDAP WHERE attainment >= 0.75 AND IS_TRUE_REP = 1 AND REP_IN_PLACE = 'In Place' AND AT_EMP_STATUS = 'Active') / NULLIF(COUNT(AE_IN_SEAT), 0); attainment = SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT IN ('Won','Forecast','Upside - Committed')) / SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL)
kpis.formulaPbix: Count of AEs with >=75% attainment / Total AE in Seats, where attainment = (W+F+UC) / Quota QTD, close quarter = CQ

kpis.name: % Participation Team
kpis.definition: % of Teams that Participated vs Total Teams at FLM level. Team participation = more than 50% of reps in team have attainment (or Proj Finish) >75%
kpis.formula: COUNT(teams WHERE >50% of reps attainment > 75%) / COUNT(total teams at vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.FLM_LDAP level)
kpis.formulaPbix: Count of teams where >50% of reps have attainment >75% / Total teams

kpis.name: My Participation (QTD)
kpis.definition: Attainment (W+F+UC) for CQ for the individual logging in - Individual's Attainment (Curr Qtr Proj Finish) with $ subtext
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT IN ('Won','Forecast','Upside - Committed')) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL), 0) for individual REP_LDAP, vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0
kpis.formulaPbix: Individual (W+F+UC) / Individual Quota for CQ

kpis.name: Account R/Y/G by ARR
kpis.definition: Shows % distribution of ARR of Accounts for each Account Health color in the Account patch. No. of Accounts shown in subtext
kpis.formula: Approximated: Group by vw_TF_EBI_Retention.CUSTOMER_HEALTH, SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB) per color / total (published dataset in PBIX)
kpis.formulaPbix: Group accounts by Account Health (R/Y/G), show % of ARR and count
kpis.notes: Published dataset in PBIX; DB proxy uses vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB grouped by CUSTOMER_HEALTH

kpis.name: Account R/Y/G by count
kpis.definition: Shows % distribution of Count of Accounts for each Account Health color in the Account patch
kpis.formula: Approximated: Group by vw_TF_EBI_Retention.CUSTOMER_HEALTH, COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ACCOUNT_ID) per color (published dataset in PBIX)
kpis.formulaPbix: Group accounts by Account Health (R/Y/G), show % of count
kpis.notes: Published dataset in PBIX; DB proxy uses ACCOUNT_ID count grouped by CUSTOMER_HEALTH

kpis.name: ARRAVG (Total Parent Account count as subtext)
kpis.definition: ARRAVG for all Parents in the user's patch, with no. of Parents as subtext
kpis.formula: Approximated: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB) / COUNT(DISTINCT ACCOUNT_PARENT_ID) (published dataset in PBIX)
kpis.formulaPbix: Sum of ARR / Count of Parent Accounts
kpis.notes: Published dataset in PBIX; DB proxy uses vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB / parent accounts

kpis.name: ARRAVG (Total Sub Account count as subtext)
kpis.definition: ARRAVG for all Subs in the user's patch, with no. of Subs as subtext
kpis.formula: Approximated: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB) / COUNT(DISTINCT ACCOUNT_ID) (published dataset in PBIX)
kpis.formulaPbix: Sum of ARR / Count of Sub Accounts
kpis.notes: Published dataset in PBIX; DB proxy uses vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB / sub accounts

kpis.name: Creation Gap QTD %
kpis.definition: % of Gap to Creation Target QTD vs Creation Target QTD. Creation = total pipeline qualified to stage 3 and above
kpis.formula: (GROSS_CREATION_QTD_TARGET - SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE vw_EBI_SALES_STAGE.SalesStageGrp_Sort >= 1 AND vw_EBI_Caldate.QUALIFICATION_QTR_BKT = 0)) / NULLIF(GROSS_CREATION_QTD_TARGET, 0)

components.Creation: Pipeline qualified to stage 3 and above

kpis.formulaPbix: (Creation Target QTD - Creation QTD) / Creation Target QTD

kpis.name: Creation Gap YTD %
kpis.definition: % of Gap to Creation Target YTD vs Creation Target YTD. Creation = total pipeline qualified to stage 3 and above
kpis.formula: (GROSS_CREATION_YTD_TARGET - CREATION_YTD) / NULLIF(GROSS_CREATION_YTD_TARGET, 0)
kpis.formulaPbix: ((Full Qtr Creation Target for prev Qtrs + Creation Target QTD) - Creation YTD) / (Full Qtr Creation Target for prev Qtrs + Creation Target QTD)

kpis.name: Gross Creation QTD
kpis.definition: % of Total pipeline qualified to stage 3 and above QTD vs Creation Target QTD. Oppty $ where Stage in 3,4,5,6,7, closed booked, clean up, lost; qualification quarter = CQ and close quarter in CQ..CQ+4
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE vw_EBI_SALES_STAGE.SALES_STAGE NOT IN ('S1','S2') AND vw_EBI_Caldate.QUALIFICATION_QTR_BKT = 0) / NULLIF(GROSS_CREATION_QTD_TARGET, 0)

components.Gross Creation: Oppty $ where Stage in 3,4,5,6,7, closed booked, clean up, lost; qualification quarter = CQ; close quarter in CQ, CQ+1, CQ+2, CQ+3, CQ+4

kpis.formulaPbix: Gross Creation $ / Gross Creation QTD Targets

kpis.name: Gross Creation YTD
kpis.definition: % of Total pipeline qualified to stage 3 and above YTD vs Creation Target YTD. Same stage and quarter filters as Gross Creation QTD.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE vw_EBI_SALES_STAGE.SALES_STAGE NOT IN ('S1','S2') AND vw_EBI_Caldate.QUALIFICATION_QTR_BKT <= 0) / NULLIF(GROSS_CREATION_YTD_TARGET, 0)
kpis.formulaPbix: Gross Creation $ YTD / Gross Creation YTD Targets

kpis.name: Mature Pipe SS5+ (Q+1)
kpis.definition: Mature pipeline (S5+) $ w.r.t. total bookings target $ for CQ+1
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE IN_PIPELINE = 1 AND vw_EBI_SALES_STAGE.SalesStageGrp_Sort = 2) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL), 0) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 1
kpis.formulaPbix: Sum of GNARR $ / Bookings Targets where Sales Stage = S5+ at CQ+1

kpis.name: RBOB
kpis.definition: Baseline ARRAVG of the account patch for CQ. Calc: IC RBoB$ + OOC RBoB$
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB)

components.IC RBoB: In Contract Renewal Base of Business
components.OOC RBoB: Out of Contract Renewal Base of Business

kpis.formulaPbix: IC RBoB$ + OOC RBoB$
kpis.notes: IC RBoB + OOC RBoB components not separately stored; SUM(RBOB) is the DB equivalent

kpis.name: Renewal Rate Outlook
kpis.definition: (RBOB + Attrition Outlook updated by RSOM in Elixir) / RBOB, calculated for CQ
kpis.formula: (SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB) + SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ARR_Impact)) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB), 0) WHERE vw_TD_EBI_Retention_MetaData.PIPELINE_RENEWAL <> 'PQ Trailing'
kpis.formulaPbix: (RBOB + Attrition Outlook) / RBOB
kpis.notes: Renewal rate uses PIPELINE_RENEWAL filter on vw_TD_EBI_Retention_MetaData, not directly on Retention fact

kpis.name: S3+ Q+1 Covx
kpis.definition: Current pipeline (S3+) $ w.r.t. total bookings target $ for CQ+1
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE IN_PIPELINE = 1 AND vw_EBI_SALES_STAGE.SalesStageGrp_Sort >= 1) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL), 0) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 1
kpis.formulaPbix: S3+ in CQ+1 / Quota for CQ+1

kpis.name: S5+ Q+1 Covx
kpis.definition: Mature pipeline (S5+) $ w.r.t. total bookings target $ for CQ+1
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE IN_PIPELINE = 1 AND vw_EBI_SALES_STAGE.SalesStageGrp_Sort = 2) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL), 0) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 1
kpis.formulaPbix: S5+ in CQ+1 / Quota for CQ+1

kpis.name: Solution R/Y/G by ARR
kpis.definition: Shows % distribution of ARR of solutions for each Solution Health color in the Account patch
kpis.formula: Approximated: Group by vw_TF_EBI_Retention.CUSTOMER_SOLUTION_HEALTH, SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB) per color / total (published dataset in PBIX)
kpis.formulaPbix: Group solutions by Solution Health (R/Y/G), show % ARR and count
kpis.notes: Published dataset in PBIX; DB proxy uses vw_TF_EBI_Retention grouped by CUSTOMER_SOLUTION_HEALTH

kpis.name: Solution R/Y/G by count
kpis.definition: Shows % distribution of Count of solutions for each Solution Health color in the Account patch
kpis.formula: Approximated: Group by vw_TF_EBI_Retention.CUSTOMER_SOLUTION_HEALTH, COUNT(DISTINCT acc_sol_key) per color (published dataset in PBIX)
kpis.formulaPbix: Group solutions by Solution Health (R/Y/G), show % count
kpis.notes: Published dataset in PBIX; DB proxy uses CUSTOMER_SOLUTION_HEALTH count

kpis.name: Tier 1 PRNT Account Completion %
kpis.definition: % of Tier 1 Account Plans completed count vs Total Tier 1 Accounts. Counted at Parent Level. Tracked via Territory Account Planning Tool (TPT).
kpis.formula: Approximated: external Territory Planning Tool (TPT) — not directly queryable from DB
kpis.formulaPbix: Number of Accounts with Completed Plans × 100 / Total Number of Accounts
kpis.notes: External tool (TPT); not directly queryable from DB

kpis.name: Tier 1 Sub Account Completion %
kpis.definition: % of Tier 1 Account Plans completed count vs Total Tier 1 Accounts. Counted at Sub Level.
kpis.formula: Approximated: external Territory Planning Tool (TPT) — not directly queryable from DB
kpis.formulaPbix: Completed Tier 1 Sub Account Plans / Total Tier 1 Sub Accounts
kpis.notes: External tool (TPT); not directly queryable from DB

kpis.name: Upsell attach Rate
kpis.definition: Shows Count or $ of upsell deals attached S3+ with Renewal deals vs Total $ of renewal deals. Upsell = Sub ID+OPG+MA+Opp Close Qtr.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE UPSELL_TYPE = 'Renewal Upsell' AND vw_EBI_SALES_STAGE.SalesStageGrp_Sort >= 1) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB WHERE vw_TD_EBI_Retention_MetaData.PIPELINE_RENEWAL <> 'PQ Trailing'), 0)
kpis.formulaPbix: QTD: Upsell deals S3+ with Renewal in CQ / Total renewal deals $. YTD: same for YTD.
kpis.notes: Renewal matching requires Sub ID+OPG+MA+Opp Close Qtr composite key

kpis.name: Pipeline L2 YTD %
kpis.definition: YTD % of total gross creation w.r.t. total gross creation targets till date
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY Gross Creation YTD) / NULLIF(Gross Creation YTD Target, 0)
kpis.formulaPbix: Total Gross Creation YTD × 100 / Total Gross Creation Target YTD

kpis.name: S4+ PROG vs S3 BoQ %
kpis.definition: % of total pipeline that moved from S3 to S4+ and booked, covering deals with close dates in current and next two qtrs, w.r.t. total S3 pipeline at start of qtr
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY progressed S3->S4+ and booked, close CQ to CQ+2) / NULLIF(BOQ S3 pipeline from vw_TF_EBI_PIPE_WALK, 0)
kpis.formulaPbix: Sum of Pipeline $ progressed to Stage 4+ and booked (close qtr = CQ or next 2) / BOQ stage 3 pipeline

kpis.name: S5+ PROG vs TGT %
kpis.definition: % of pipe $, deals moving from S3 or 4 to S5 or beyond including won, for current and next two qtrs, w.r.t. True progression targets
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY progressed S3/S4->S5+ or booked, close CQ to CQ+2) / NULLIF(True progression targets, 0)
kpis.formulaPbix: Sum of Pipeline $ progressed to Stage 5+ or booked (close qtr = CQ or next 2) / True progression targets

kpis.name: PIPE COV X
kpis.definition: Current pipeline $ w.r.t. total bookings target $. Applied for CQ+1, CQ+2, CQ+3.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE IN_PIPELINE = 1) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL), 0) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND IN (1,2,3)
kpis.formulaPbix: Total pipe $ / Bookings Target $ where close quarter = CQ+1 (or CQ+2, CQ+3)

kpis.name: S5+ COV X
kpis.definition: Mature pipeline $ w.r.t. total bookings target $. Total SS5+ pipe $ / Bookings Target $ where close quarter = CQ+1, CQ+2, or CQ+3
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE IN_PIPELINE = 1 AND vw_EBI_SALES_STAGE.SalesStageGrp_Sort = 2) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL), 0) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND IN (1,2,3)
kpis.formulaPbix: Total SS5+ pipe $ / Bookings Target $ where close quarter = CQ+1 (or CQ+2, CQ+3)

kpis.name: STALLED %
kpis.definition: % of stalled pipeline $ w.r.t. total pipeline $. Use STALLED_BUT_INACTIVE = 'Stalled & Inactive' flag on vw_TF_EBI_P2S to identify stalled deals. Active = Total Pipe - Stalled.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE STALLED_BUT_INACTIVE = 'Stalled & Inactive') / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE IN_PIPELINE = 1), 0)

components.STALLED_BUT_INACTIVE: Stalled/inactive deal indicator flag on vw_TF_EBI_P2S

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(CASE WHEN STALLED_BUT_INACTIVE = 'Stalled & Inactive' THEN OPPTY ELSE 0 END) / SUM(OPPTY) where IN_PIPELINE = 1

kpis.name: AE >1.2X S5+ %
kpis.definition: Count of AEs that met mature coverage 1.2x w.r.t. total In Place Active AEs. Close quarter = CQ+1
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.REP_LDAP WHERE S5+ covx >= 1.2) / NULLIF(COUNT(AE_IN_SEAT), 0) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 1
kpis.formulaPbix: Count of AEs with >= 1.2x Mature covx / Total AE in Seats where close quarter = CQ+1

kpis.name: AE >2X %
kpis.definition: Count of AEs that met total pipe coverage 2x w.r.t. total In Place Active AEs. Close quarter = CQ+2 or CQ+3
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.REP_LDAP WHERE pipe covx >= 2.0) / NULLIF(COUNT(AE_IN_SEAT), 0) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND IN (2,3)
kpis.formulaPbix: Count of AEs with >= 2x Pipe covx / Total AE in Seats where close quarter = CQ+2 (or CQ+3)

kpis.name: AE PART @75% QTD %
kpis.definition: Count of reps that attained 75% of their quota in the current quarter w.r.t. total In-Place Active reps
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.REP_LDAP WHERE attainment >= 0.75) / NULLIF(COUNT(AE_IN_SEAT), 0) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0
kpis.formulaPbix: Count of AEs with >= 75% attainment / Total AE in Seats where close quarter = CQ

kpis.name: AE PART @75% YTD %
kpis.definition: Count of reps that attained 75% of their quota in the year to date w.r.t. total In-Place Active reps
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.REP_LDAP WHERE YTD attainment >= 0.75) / NULLIF(COUNT(AE_IN_SEAT), 0)
kpis.formulaPbix: Count of AEs with >= 75% attainment / Total AE in Seats where close quarter = CQ or Past Quarter in year

kpis.name: AE IN SEAT %
kpis.definition: Count of total in-place active reps w.r.t. total Active reps
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.REP_LDAP WHERE IS_TRUE_REP = 1 AND REP_IN_PLACE = 'In Place' AND AT_EMP_STATUS = 'Active') / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT REP_LDAP WHERE IS_TRUE_REP = 1 AND AT_EMP_STATUS = 'Active'), 0)
kpis.formulaPbix: Count of active in-place AEs / Total active AE

kpis.name: FLM W/ >50% AE @75% YTD
kpis.definition: Count of FLMs whose more than 50% reps have attained more than 75% of their quota in the year to date w.r.t. total Active FLMs
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.FLM_LDAP WHERE >50% AEs at >= 75% YTD) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT FLM_LDAP WHERE IS_TRUE_FLM = 1), 0)
kpis.formulaPbix: Count of FLMs with >= 50% of AEs attained quota >= 75% / Total FLMs in Seats where close quarter = CQ or Past Quarter in year

kpis.name: FLM PART @75% YTD %
kpis.definition: Count of FLMs that attained 75% of their quota in the year to date w.r.t. total In-Place Active FLMs
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.FLM_LDAP WHERE attainment >= 0.75) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT FLM_LDAP WHERE IS_TRUE_FLM = 1), 0)
kpis.formulaPbix: Count of FLMs with >= 75% attainment / Total FLMs in Seats where close quarter = CQ or Past Quarter in year

kpis.name: Net %
kpis.definition: % of Net ARR (Difference of GNARR $ and Attrition $ outlooks) vs total Net ARR Plan/QRF $, with $ values as subtext
kpis.formula: (SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT IN ('Won','Forecast','Upside - Committed')) - ABS(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ARR_Impact))) / NULLIF(Net_Plan, 0) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0
kpis.formulaPbix: Current Qtr Net Outlook $ / Current Qtr Net Plan $
kpis.notes: Net Plan/QRF is a VP-level composite; approximated

kpis.name: RBOB w/o PQ Trail
kpis.definition: Renewal Base of Business excluding Prior Quarter Trailing renewals. Represents the total renewal obligation for the period, filtering out PQ trailing deals that were already booked in a prior quarter.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB) WHERE vw_TD_EBI_Retention_MetaData.PIPELINE_RENEWAL <> 'PQ Trailing'
kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(r.RBOB) from vw_TF_EBI_Retention r JOIN vw_TD_EBI_Retention_MetaData m ON r.Retention_MetaData_ID = m.Retention_MetaData_ID WHERE m.PIPELINE_RENEWAL <> 'PQ Trailing'

kpis.name: CQ Renewal Rate
kpis.definition: Current quarter renewal rate, calculated as the ratio of actual renewals (RBOB + ARR Impact) to the renewal base (RBOB w/o PQ Trail). Shows what percentage of the renewal base has been retained.
kpis.formula: (SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB) + SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ARR_Impact)) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB), 0) WHERE vw_TD_EBI_Retention_MetaData.PIPELINE_RENEWAL <> 'PQ Trailing' AND vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0

components.numerator: RBOB w/o PQ Trail + ARR Impact (actual retained amount)
components.denominator: RBOB w/o PQ Trail (total renewal base)

kpis.formulaPbix: (SUM(r.RBOB) + SUM(r.ARR_Impact)) / NULLIF(SUM(r.RBOB), 0) from vw_TF_EBI_Retention r WHERE PIPELINE_RENEWAL <> 'PQ Trailing' AND QTR_BKT_IND = 0

kpis.name: CQ Renewal Rate Outlook
kpis.definition: Current quarter renewal rate outlook, same as Renewal Rate but computed for CQ with outlook adjustments (removes snapshot filters to show the latest view).
kpis.formula: (SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB) + SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ARR_Impact)) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB), 0) WHERE vw_TD_EBI_Retention_MetaData.PIPELINE_RENEWAL <> 'PQ Trailing' AND vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0

components.numerator: RBOB w/o PQ Trail + ARR Impact (OCC variant removes snapshot filters)

kpis.formulaPbix: (SUM(r.RBOB) + SUM(r.ARR_Impact)) / NULLIF(SUM(r.RBOB), 0) from vw_TF_EBI_Retention r WHERE PIPELINE_RENEWAL <> 'PQ Trailing' AND QTR_BKT_IND = 0 -- uses latest snapshot removing IS_LATEST_SNAPSHOT filter

kpis.name: ARR IMPACT
kpis.definition: Sum of ARR impact from retention events. Negative values indicate attrition (lost renewals), positive values indicate upsells. Measures the net dollar effect of retention outcomes on Annual Recurring Revenue.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ARR_Impact)

components.value: SUM(Retention.ARR_Impact) — net impact on ARR from all retention events

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(r.ARR_Impact) from vw_TF_EBI_Retention r

kpis.name: RENEWALS ATTRITION $
kpis.definition: Planned/targeted attrition dollar amount from the renewals target table. Represents the expected attrition budget based on the selected target type (Quota, Plan, or QRF).
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_RENEWALS_TARGET.ATTRITION) WHERE vw_TD_EBI_TARGET_TYPE.TARGET_TYPE = @SelectedTargetType

components.value: SUM(RENEWALS_TARGET.ATTRITION) filtered by selected target type

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(rt.ATTRITION) from vw_TF_EBI_RENEWALS_TARGET rt JOIN vw_TD_EBI_TARGET_TYPE tt ON rt.TARGET_TYPE_ID = tt.TARGET_TYPE_ID WHERE tt.TARGET_TYPE = @SelectedTargetType

kpis.name: CQ Attrition $
kpis.definition: Current quarter attrition in dollars. The ARR Impact filtered to the current quarter, representing the dollar amount of renewals lost or reduced in CQ.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ARR_Impact) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0

components.value: ARR IMPACT filtered to current quarter (QTR_BKT_IND = 0)

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(r.ARR_Impact) from vw_TF_EBI_Retention r JOIN vw_EBI_Caldate c ON ... WHERE c.QTR_BKT_IND = 0

kpis.name: FY Attrition $
kpis.definition: Fiscal year attrition in dollars. ARR Impact summed across all quarters in the current fiscal year.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ARR_Impact) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.CLOSE_YR_BKT_NUMBER = 0

components.value: ARR IMPACT filtered to current fiscal year (CLOSE_YR_BKT_NUMBER = 0)

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(r.ARR_Impact) from vw_TF_EBI_Retention r JOIN vw_EBI_Caldate c ON ... WHERE c.CLOSE_YR_BKT_NUMBER = 0

kpis.name: Savables
kpis.definition: Dollar amount of at-risk renewals that are considered savable (positive RISK_UPSIDE_AMOUNT). Represents potential attrition that could be recovered through proactive retention efforts.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RISK_UPSIDE_AMOUNT) WHERE RISK_UPSIDE_AMOUNT > 0

components.value: SUM(Retention.RISK_UPSIDE_AMOUNT) where amount is positive (savable upside)

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(r.RISK_UPSIDE_AMOUNT) from vw_TF_EBI_Retention r WHERE r.RISK_UPSIDE_AMOUNT > 0

kpis.name: Downsell Deal #
kpis.definition: Count of distinct renewal deals classified as downsells. Counts deals where the customer renewed at a lower amount than the original base.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TF_EBI_Retention.Retention_MetaData_ID) WHERE vw_TD_EBI_Retention_MetaData.RENEWAL_TYPE = 'Downsell' AND (vw_TD_EBI_Retention_MetaData.LINE_CATEGORY = 'System Line' OR (LINE_CATEGORY = 'Customer Adjustment' AND INTERNAL_SEGMENT_NET_OFF IS NULL))

components.value: DISTINCT COUNT of Retention_MetaData_ID where RENEWAL_TYPE = 'Downsell'

kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT r.Retention_MetaData_ID) from vw_TF_EBI_Retention r JOIN vw_TD_EBI_Retention_MetaData m ON ... WHERE m.RENEWAL_TYPE = 'Downsell' AND (m.LINE_CATEGORY = 'System Line' OR (m.LINE_CATEGORY = 'Customer Adjustment' AND m.INTERNAL_SEGMENT_NET_OFF IS NULL))

kpis.name: Full Attrition Deal #
kpis.definition: Count of distinct renewal deals that were fully lost (complete attrition). The customer did not renew at all.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TF_EBI_Retention.Retention_MetaData_ID) WHERE vw_TD_EBI_Retention_MetaData.RENEWAL_TYPE = 'Lost' AND (vw_TD_EBI_Retention_MetaData.LINE_CATEGORY = 'System Line' OR (LINE_CATEGORY = 'Customer Adjustment' AND INTERNAL_SEGMENT_NET_OFF IS NULL))

components.value: DISTINCT COUNT of Retention_MetaData_ID where RENEWAL_TYPE = 'Lost'

kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT r.Retention_MetaData_ID) from vw_TF_EBI_Retention r JOIN vw_TD_EBI_Retention_MetaData m ON ... WHERE m.RENEWAL_TYPE = 'Lost' AND (m.LINE_CATEGORY = 'System Line' OR (m.LINE_CATEGORY = 'Customer Adjustment' AND m.INTERNAL_SEGMENT_NET_OFF IS NULL))

kpis.name: ON TIME RENEWAL #
kpis.definition: Count of distinct renewals processed on time (before or by the service end date).
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TF_EBI_Retention.Retention_MetaData_ID) WHERE vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ON_TIME_RENEWAL = 'Yes'

components.value: DISTINCT COUNT of Retention_MetaData_ID where ON_TIME_RENEWAL = 'Yes'

kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT r.Retention_MetaData_ID) from vw_TF_EBI_Retention r WHERE r.ON_TIME_RENEWAL = 'Yes'

kpis.name: LTG OVERDUE
kpis.definition: Count of renewal deals that are left to go (not yet closed) and overdue (service end date is in the past). Indicates renewals that should have been completed but remain open.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TF_EBI_Retention.Retention_MetaData_ID) WHERE vw_TD_EBI_Retention_MetaData.OUTLOOK_CATEGORY = 'Left To Go' AND vw_TD_EBI_Retention_MetaData.SERVICE_END_DATE < GETDATE()

components.value: DISTINCT COUNT of Retention_MetaData_ID where OUTLOOK_CATEGORY = 'Left To Go' and SERVICE_END_DATE < today

kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT r.Retention_MetaData_ID) from vw_TF_EBI_Retention r JOIN vw_TD_EBI_Retention_MetaData m ON ... WHERE m.OUTLOOK_CATEGORY = 'Left To Go' AND m.SERVICE_END_DATE < GETDATE() AND (m.LINE_CATEGORY = 'System Line' OR (m.LINE_CATEGORY = 'Customer Adjustment' AND m.INTERNAL_SEGMENT_NET_OFF IS NULL))

kpis.name: Retention Accounts Count
kpis.definition: Count of distinct accounts that have renewal base of business (RBOB). Shows how many accounts have upcoming renewals.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ACCOUNT_ID) WHERE SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB) IS NOT NULL

components.value: COUNT of distinct ACCOUNT_IDs that have non-null RBOB values

kpis.formulaPbix: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sub.ACCOUNT_ID) FROM (SELECT a.ACCOUNT_ID, SUM(r.RBOB) as rbob FROM vw_TF_EBI_Retention r JOIN Account a ON ... GROUP BY a.ACCOUNT_ID) sub

kpis.name: CQ+1 Renewal Rate
kpis.definition: Renewal rate for the next quarter (CQ+1). Shows the RBOB attainment percentage for Q+1 pipeline.
kpis.formula: (SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB) + SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ARR_Impact)) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB), 0) WHERE vw_TD_EBI_Retention_MetaData.PIPELINE_RENEWAL <> 'PQ Trailing' AND vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 1

components.numerator: RBOB w/o PQ Trail + ARR Impact for Q+1
components.denominator: RBOB w/o PQ Trail for Q+1

kpis.formulaPbix: (SUM(r.RBOB) + SUM(r.ARR_Impact)) / NULLIF(SUM(r.RBOB), 0) from vw_TF_EBI_Retention r WHERE PIPELINE_RENEWAL <> 'PQ Trailing' AND QTR_BKT_IND = 1

kpis.name: CQ+2 Renewal Rate
kpis.definition: Renewal rate for two quarters ahead (CQ+2).
kpis.formula: (SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB) + SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ARR_Impact)) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB), 0) WHERE vw_TD_EBI_Retention_MetaData.PIPELINE_RENEWAL <> 'PQ Trailing' AND vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 2

components.numerator: RBOB w/o PQ Trail + ARR Impact for Q+2
components.denominator: RBOB w/o PQ Trail for Q+2

kpis.formulaPbix: (SUM(r.RBOB) + SUM(r.ARR_Impact)) / NULLIF(SUM(r.RBOB), 0) from vw_TF_EBI_Retention r WHERE PIPELINE_RENEWAL <> 'PQ Trailing' AND QTR_BKT_IND = 2

kpis.name: CQ+3 Renewal Rate
kpis.definition: Renewal rate for three quarters ahead (CQ+3).
kpis.formula: (SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB) + SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ARR_Impact)) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB), 0) WHERE vw_TD_EBI_Retention_MetaData.PIPELINE_RENEWAL <> 'PQ Trailing' AND vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 3

components.numerator: RBOB w/o PQ Trail + ARR Impact for Q+3
components.denominator: RBOB w/o PQ Trail for Q+3

kpis.formulaPbix: (SUM(r.RBOB) + SUM(r.ARR_Impact)) / NULLIF(SUM(r.RBOB), 0) from vw_TF_EBI_Retention r WHERE PIPELINE_RENEWAL <> 'PQ Trailing' AND QTR_BKT_IND = 3

kpis.name: CQ+1 Attrition $
kpis.definition: ARR Impact for the next quarter (CQ+1), representing expected attrition one quarter out.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ARR_Impact) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 1

components.value: ARR IMPACT filtered to QTR_BKT_IND = 1

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(r.ARR_Impact) from vw_TF_EBI_Retention r JOIN vw_EBI_Caldate c ON ... WHERE c.QTR_BKT_IND = 1

kpis.name: CQ+2 Attrition $
kpis.definition: ARR Impact for two quarters ahead (CQ+2).
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ARR_Impact) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 2

components.value: ARR IMPACT filtered to QTR_BKT_IND = 2

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(r.ARR_Impact) from vw_TF_EBI_Retention r JOIN vw_EBI_Caldate c ON ... WHERE c.QTR_BKT_IND = 2

kpis.name: CQ+3 Attrition $
kpis.definition: ARR Impact for three quarters ahead (CQ+3).
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ARR_Impact) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 3

components.value: ARR IMPACT filtered to QTR_BKT_IND = 3

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(r.ARR_Impact) from vw_TF_EBI_Retention r JOIN vw_EBI_Caldate c ON ... WHERE c.QTR_BKT_IND = 3

kpis.name: CQ Upsell $ Attach Rate
kpis.definition: Dollar-based upsell attach rate for the current quarter. Ratio of Renewal Upsell pipeline dollars to the RBOB for CQ. Shows how much upsell revenue is being generated relative to the renewal base.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE UPSELL_TYPE = 'Renewal Upsell') / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB WHERE vw_TD_EBI_Retention_MetaData.PIPELINE_RENEWAL <> 'PQ Trailing'), 0) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0 AND vw_EBI_Caldate.IS_LATEST_SNAPSHOT = 1

components.numerator: OPPTY $ where UPSELL_TYPE = 'Renewal Upsell' for CQ (latest snapshot)
components.denominator: RBOB w/o PQ Trail for CQ

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(p.OPPTY) / NULLIF(SUM(r.RBOB), 0) WHERE p.UPSELL_TYPE = 'Renewal Upsell' AND c.QTR_BKT_IND = 0 AND c.IS_LATEST_SNAPSHOT = 1 — numerator from vw_TF_EBI_P2S, denominator RBOB w/o PQ Trail from vw_TF_EBI_Retention

kpis.name: CQ Upsell # Attach %
kpis.definition: Count-based upsell attach percentage for the current quarter. Ratio of distinct Renewal Upsell deals to distinct renewal accounts in CQ. Shows the percentage of renewing accounts that also have upsell activity.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TF_EBI_P2S.Upsell_Attach_Key_Pipeline WHERE UPSELL_TYPE = 'Renewal Upsell' AND vw_EBI_DEAL_TYPE.CROSS_UPSELL_DISPLAY = 'Upsell') / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TF_EBI_Retention.Upsell_Attach_Key_Ren), 0) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0

components.numerator: DISTINCT COUNT of Upsell deals (Renewal Upsell type, Upsell deal type) for CQ
components.denominator: DISTINCT COUNT of renewal keys for CQ

kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT p.Upsell_Attach_Key_Pipeline) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT r.Upsell_Attach_Key_Ren), 0) WHERE p.UPSELL_TYPE = 'Renewal Upsell' AND p.DEAL_TYPE = 'Upsell' AND c.QTR_BKT_IND = 0

kpis.name: CQ Attrition %
kpis.definition: CQ attrition as a percentage of plan. Compares actual attrition to the attrition target — result of 1 minus the normalized gap. Values above 100% mean attrition is better than plan; below 100% means worse.
kpis.formula: 1 - ((SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ARR_Impact WHERE QTR_BKT_IND = 0) - SUM(vw_TF_EBI_RENEWALS_TARGET.ATTRITION WHERE QTR_BKT_IND = 0)) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_RENEWALS_TARGET.ATTRITION WHERE QTR_BKT_IND = 0), 0))

components.numerator: CQ ARR IMPACT (actual) minus CQ attrition target

kpis.formulaPbix: 1 - ((actual_attrition - target_attrition) / NULLIF(target_attrition, 0)) where actual = SUM(ARR_Impact) for CQ, target = SUM(RENEWALS_TARGET.ATTRITION) for CQ

kpis.name: COVERAGE PIPE / BOOKINGS TARGET X
kpis.definition: Total pipeline coverage ratio — total pipeline dollars divided by bookings target. Expressed as a multiplier (e.g., 3.2x means pipeline is 3.2 times the target).
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE IN_PIPELINE = 1) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL), 0)

components.numerator: PIPE $ — SUM(OPPTY) where IN_PIPELINE = 1
components.denominator: BOOKINGS TARGET — SUM(QUOTA_ACTUAL) or QUOTA_PLAN based on target type

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(p.OPPTY) / NULLIF(SUM(q.QUOTA_ACTUAL), 0) WHERE p.IN_PIPELINE = 1 — PIPE $ from vw_TF_EBI_P2S, BOOKINGS TARGET from vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA

kpis.name: S5+ Pipeline Cov.
kpis.definition: Mature pipeline coverage — SS5+ (Stage 5 and above) pipeline dollars divided by bookings target. Measures how much late-stage, high-probability pipeline covers the target.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE IN_PIPELINE = 1 AND vw_EBI_SALES_STAGE.SalesStageGrp_Sort = 2) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL), 0)

components.numerator: SS5+ $ — PIPE $ filtered to SalesStageGrp_Sort = 2 (S5+)

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(p.OPPTY) / NULLIF(SUM(q.QUOTA_ACTUAL), 0) WHERE p.IN_PIPELINE = 1 AND ss.SalesStageGrp_Sort = 2 — SS5+ from vw_TF_EBI_P2S, BOOKINGS TARGET from vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA

kpis.name: Total Pipe Cov.
kpis.definition: Total pipeline coverage relative to the remaining target (left to go). PIPE $ divided by TARGET LEFT TO GO $ (bookings target minus won). More meaningful than raw coverage as it accounts for deals already closed.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE IN_PIPELINE = 1) / NULLIF(GREATEST(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL) - SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Won'), 0), 0)

components.numerator: PIPE $ — total active pipeline
components.denominator: TARGET LEFT TO GO $ = BOOKINGS TARGET - WON $, floored at 0

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(p.OPPTY) / NULLIF(GREATEST(SUM(q.QUOTA_ACTUAL) - SUM(won.OPPTY), 0), 0) WHERE p.IN_PIPELINE = 1

kpis.name: PIPE TARGET
kpis.definition: Pipeline requirement target — the amount of pipeline needed to achieve the bookings goal. Derived from quota pipeline requirement (QUOTA_REQ) or Plan/QRF pipeline requirement.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_REQ) or SUM(vw_TF_EBI_PLAN_RPT.PIPELINE_REQ) based on vw_TD_EBI_TARGET_TYPE.TARGET_TYPE

components.value: QUOTA_REQ (Quota target type) or PIPELINE_REQ (Plan/QRF target type)

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(q.QUOTA_REQ) from vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA q — or SUM(pq.PIPELINE_REQ) from vw_TF_EBI_PLAN_RPT based on selected target type

kpis.name: PIPE TARGET SS5
kpis.definition: Pipeline requirement target for mature (S5+) pipeline specifically. The required S5+ pipeline amount to hit bookings goals.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_REQ_SS5) or SUM(vw_TF_EBI_PLAN_RPT.PIPELINE_REQ_SS5) based on vw_TD_EBI_TARGET_TYPE.TARGET_TYPE

components.value: QUOTA_REQ_SS5 (Quota) or PIPELINE_REQ_SS5 (Plan/QRF)

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(q.QUOTA_REQ_SS5) from vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA q — or SUM(pq.PIPELINE_REQ_SS5) from vw_TF_EBI_PLAN_RPT based on target type

kpis.name: BOOKINGS TARGET
kpis.definition: Bookings target amount for the period. Defaults to quota (QUOTA_ACTUAL) but can switch to Plan or QRF targets. At rep/manager level always uses Quota.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL) or SUM(vw_TF_EBI_PLAN_RPT.QUOTA_PLAN) based on vw_TD_EBI_TARGET_TYPE.TARGET_TYPE

components.value: QUOTA_ACTUAL (Quota target type) or QUOTA_PLAN (Plan/QRF target type)

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(q.QUOTA_ACTUAL) from vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA q — or SUM(pq.QUOTA_PLAN) from vw_TF_EBI_PLAN_RPT based on target type

kpis.name: TARGET LEFT TO GO $
kpis.definition: Remaining bookings target after subtracting won deals. Shows how much more needs to be closed to hit the target. Floored at zero (if won exceeds target, LTG = 0).
kpis.formula: GREATEST(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL) - SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Won'), 0)

components.numerator: BOOKINGS TARGET

kpis.formulaPbix: GREATEST(SUM(q.QUOTA_ACTUAL) - SUM(CASE WHEN p.ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Won' THEN p.OPPTY END), 0) — BOOKINGS TARGET minus WON $, minimum 0

kpis.name: BOQ PIPE $
kpis.definition: Total pipeline dollars at the beginning of the quarter. Snapshot of PIPE $ where IS_BOQ flag is TRUE.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY) WHERE vw_TF_EBI_P2S.IN_PIPELINE = 1 AND vw_TF_EBI_P2S.IS_BOQ = 'TRUE'

components.value: PIPE $ at BOQ snapshot (IS_BOQ = TRUE)

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(p.OPPTY) from vw_TF_EBI_P2S p WHERE p.IN_PIPELINE = 1 AND p.IS_BOQ = 'TRUE'

kpis.name: BOQ MATURE PIPE $
kpis.definition: Mature (S5+) pipeline dollars at the beginning of the quarter. SS5+ $ where IS_BOQ flag is TRUE.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY) WHERE vw_TF_EBI_P2S.IN_PIPELINE = 1 AND vw_EBI_SALES_STAGE.SalesStageGrp_Sort = 2 AND vw_TF_EBI_P2S.IS_BOQ = 'TRUE'

components.value: SS5+ $ at BOQ snapshot

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(p.OPPTY) from vw_TF_EBI_P2S p JOIN vw_EBI_SALES_STAGE ss ON ... WHERE p.IN_PIPELINE = 1 AND ss.SalesStageGrp_Sort = 2 AND p.IS_BOQ = 'TRUE'

kpis.name: S3 $
kpis.definition: Pipeline dollars at Stage 3. S3 deals are in early pipeline — qualified but not yet in advanced stages.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY) WHERE vw_TF_EBI_P2S.IN_PIPELINE = 1 AND vw_EBI_SALES_STAGE.SalesStageGrp = 'S3'

components.value: PIPE $ filtered to SalesStageGrp = 'S3'

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(p.OPPTY) from vw_TF_EBI_P2S p JOIN vw_EBI_SALES_STAGE ss ON ... WHERE p.IN_PIPELINE = 1 AND ss.SalesStageGrp = 'S3'

kpis.name: S4 $
kpis.definition: Pipeline dollars at Stage 4. S4 deals are in mid-pipeline with higher close probability than S3.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY) WHERE vw_TF_EBI_P2S.IN_PIPELINE = 1 AND vw_EBI_SALES_STAGE.SalesStageGrp = 'S4'

components.value: PIPE $ filtered to SalesStageGrp = 'S4'

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(p.OPPTY) from vw_TF_EBI_P2S p JOIN vw_EBI_SALES_STAGE ss ON ... WHERE p.IN_PIPELINE = 1 AND ss.SalesStageGrp = 'S4'

kpis.name: SS5+ $
kpis.definition: Pipeline dollars at Stage 5 and above (mature pipeline). These deals have the highest close probability.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY) WHERE vw_TF_EBI_P2S.IN_PIPELINE = 1 AND vw_EBI_SALES_STAGE.SalesStageGrp_Sort = 2

components.value: PIPE $ filtered to SalesStageGrp_Sort = 2 (S5+)

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(p.OPPTY) from vw_TF_EBI_P2S p JOIN vw_EBI_SALES_STAGE ss ON ... WHERE p.IN_PIPELINE = 1 AND ss.SalesStageGrp_Sort = 2

kpis.name: PIPE $
kpis.definition: Total active pipeline dollars. Sum of opportunity amounts where IN_PIPELINE = 1 (S3+ stages, excluding won/lost/cleanup).
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY) WHERE vw_TF_EBI_P2S.IN_PIPELINE = 1

components.value: SUM(Pipeline.OPPTY) where IN_PIPELINE = 1

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(p.OPPTY) from vw_TF_EBI_P2S p WHERE p.IN_PIPELINE = 1

kpis.name: ACTIVE & UPDATED %
kpis.definition: Percentage of total pipeline that is actively being worked (not stalled or inactive). Active pipeline dollars divided by total pipeline dollars.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE STALLED_BUT_INACTIVE = 'Active') / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE IN_PIPELINE = 1), 0)

components.numerator: ACTIVE & UPDATED $ — PIPE $ where STALLED_BUT_INACTIVE = 'Active'

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(CASE WHEN p.STALLED_BUT_INACTIVE = 'Active' THEN p.OPPTY END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN p.IN_PIPELINE = 1 THEN p.OPPTY END), 0)

kpis.name: Stalled & Inactive %
kpis.definition: Percentage of total pipeline that is stalled or inactive. Stalled/inactive pipeline dollars divided by total pipeline dollars. High values indicate pipeline health concerns.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE STALLED_BUT_INACTIVE = 'Stalled & Inactive') / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE IN_PIPELINE = 1), 0)

components.numerator: Stalled & Inactive $ — PIPE $ where STALLED_BUT_INACTIVE = 'Stalled & Inactive'

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(CASE WHEN p.STALLED_BUT_INACTIVE = 'Stalled & Inactive' THEN p.OPPTY END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN p.IN_PIPELINE = 1 THEN p.OPPTY END), 0)

kpis.name: GROSS CREATED QTD $
kpis.definition: Gross pipeline created quarter-to-date in dollars. Sum of opportunity amounts qualified in the current quarter, excluding S1/S2 and closed/lost stages. Measures new pipeline generation.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QUALIFICATION_QTR_BKT = 0 AND vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND IN (0,1,2,3,4) AND vw_EBI_SALES_STAGE.SALES_STAGE NOT IN ('S1','S2','Closed CleanUp from Non Pipe','Closed Lost from Non Pipe')

components.value: OPPTY $ for deals qualified in CQ, in pipeline stages S3+, closing in CQ through CQ+4

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(p.OPPTY) from vw_TF_EBI_P2S p JOIN vw_EBI_Caldate c ON ... WHERE c.QUALIFICATION_QTR_BKT = 0 AND c.QTR_BKT_IND IN (0,1,2,3,4) AND ss.SALES_STAGE NOT IN ('S1','S2','Closed CleanUp from Non Pipe','Closed Lost from Non Pipe')

kpis.name: GROSS CREATION QTD %
kpis.definition: Gross pipeline creation attainment QTD — actual gross created divided by the gross creation target for the quarter. Shows progress toward the pipeline generation goal.
kpis.formula: GROSS_CREATED_QTD_$ / NULLIF(GROSS_CREATION_QTD_TARGET, 0)

components.numerator: GROSS CREATED QTD $ — actual pipeline created
components.denominator: GROSS CREATION QTD — target for pipeline creation (from generation targets)

kpis.formulaPbix: GROSS_CREATED_QTD_$ / NULLIF(GROSS_CREATION_QTD_TARGET, 0) — target is an Value from TF_EBI_GENERATION_TARGET

kpis.name: GROSS CREATION YTD %
kpis.definition: Gross pipeline creation attainment year-to-date. Actual gross created YTD divided by the YTD creation target.
kpis.formula: GROSS_CREATED_YTD_$ / NULLIF(GROSS_CREATION_YTD_TARGET, 0)

components.numerator: GROSS CREATED YTD $ — actual pipeline created YTD
components.denominator: GROSS CREATION YTD — YTD creation target

kpis.formulaPbix: GROSS_CREATED_YTD_$ / NULLIF(GROSS_CREATION_YTD_TARGET, 0)

kpis.name: FULL QUARTER GROSS CREATION
kpis.definition: Full quarter gross creation target — the total pipeline creation expected for the full quarter. Used as the denominator when calculating creation attainment. Sourced from generation target tables.
kpis.formula: Full quarter pipeline generation target from TF_EBI_GENERATION_TARGET.GENERATION_TARGET

components.value: Full quarter generation target from TF_EBI_GENERATION_TARGET

kpis.formulaPbix: represents the full-quarter pipeline generation target

kpis.name: NET PIPE CREATION QTD
kpis.definition: Net pipeline creation target QTD — the target for net new pipeline (gross creation minus losses) for the quarter to date. Sourced from generation target tables.
kpis.formula: Net creation target QTD from TF_EBI_GENERATION_TARGET.GENERATION_TARGET

components.value: Net pipeline creation target QTD

kpis.formulaPbix: net creation target QTD from TF_EBI_GENERATION_TARGET

kpis.name: % Weekly Gross Creation QTD
kpis.definition: Week-over-week change in gross pipeline creation QTD. Compares current week's gross created QTD to prior week's value to show the weekly creation pace as a percentage change.
kpis.formula: (CW_Gross_Created_QTD - PW_Gross_Created_QTD) / NULLIF(PW_Gross_Created_QTD, 0); CW = vw_EBI_Caldate.WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = 0, PW = -1

components.numerator: Current week Gross Created QTD minus prior week Gross Created QTD

kpis.formulaPbix: (CW_Gross_Created_QTD - PW_Gross_Created_QTD) / NULLIF(PW_Gross_Created_QTD, 0) — CW uses WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = 0, PW uses -1

kpis.name: S1/S2 $
kpis.definition: Pipeline dollars at Stage 1 and Stage 2 (early stage, pre-qualified). These opportunities are not yet in the active pipeline but represent future pipeline potential.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY) WHERE vw_EBI_SALES_STAGE.SalesStageGrp = 'S1-S2'

components.value: OPPTY $ filtered to SalesStageGrp = 'S1-S2'

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(p.OPPTY) from vw_TF_EBI_P2S p JOIN vw_EBI_SALES_STAGE ss ON ... WHERE ss.SalesStageGrp = 'S1-S2'

kpis.name: OPPTY WTD $
kpis.definition: Opportunity amount created in the current week to date. Shows the most recent week's pipeline generation activity.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QUALIFICATION_WEEK_BKT = 0

components.value: OPPTY $ for the current week based on WEEK_NUMBER_SORT

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(p.OPPTY) from vw_TF_EBI_P2S p JOIN vw_EBI_Caldate c ON ... WHERE c.WEEK_NUMBER_SORT = current_week_sort — uses QUALIFICATION_WEEK_BKT = 0 to identify current week

kpis.name: OPPTY TREND $
kpis.definition: Running cumulative gross pipeline created QTD up to the selected week. Used in trend charts to show the pace of pipeline creation across weeks within the quarter.
kpis.formula: Cumulative SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY) through selected vw_EBI_Caldate.WEEK_NUMBER_SORT (running total by qualification week)

components.value: Cumulative GROSS CREATED QTD $ through the selected week

kpis.formulaPbix: GROSS_CREATED_QTD_$ accumulated up to the selected qualification week — uses ISONORAFTER to build running total by WEEK_NUMBER_SORT

kpis.name: GROWTH PIPE ATTAINMENT %
kpis.definition: Growth pipeline attainment percentage — net pipeline growth QTD divided by the full quarter net pipe creation target. Measures progress toward the net pipeline growth goal.
kpis.formula: GROWTH_PIPE_QTD / NULLIF(TF_EBI_GENERATION_TARGET.GENERATION_TARGET net, 0)

components.numerator: GROWTH PIPE QTD $ — net change in pipeline (new minus lost) QTD
components.denominator: FULL QUARTER NET PIPE CREATION — full quarter net creation target

kpis.formulaPbix: GROWTH_PIPE_QTD / NULLIF(FULL_QUARTER_NET_PIPE_CREATION, 0) — GROWTH_PIPE_QTD = net change in pipeline QTD

kpis.name: SS4 PROGRESSION TARGET $
kpis.definition: Target for deals progressing to Stage 4 or above. Calculated using generation targets multiplied by SS4 progression multipliers for each future quarter. Indicates how much pipeline should advance to S4+.
kpis.formula: SUMX over qualification quarters: IN_QTR_GC_TARGET_SS4 + (TF_EBI_GENERATION_TARGET.GENERATION_TARGET * TF_EBI_GENERATION_TARGET.SS4_PROGRESSION_MULTIPLIER) for CQ+1/+2/+3

components.cq: IN_QTR_GC_TARGET_SS4 — in-quarter generation target for S4

kpis.formulaPbix: SUMX over qualification quarters: IN_QTR_GC_TARGET_SS4 for CQ + (GENERATION_TARGET_SS4 * SS4_PROGRESSION_MULTIPLIER) for CQ+1/+2/+3 — from TF_EBI_GENERATION_TARGET

kpis.name: W+F+UC $
kpis.definition: Total bookings outlook: Won + Forecast + Upside Committed pipeline dollars for the current quarter. This is the primary forecast metric representing committed deal value at various commitment stages.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT IN ('Won','Forecast','Upside - Committed')) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0
kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(CASE WHEN ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Won' THEN Oppty ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Forecast' THEN p.Oppty ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Upside - Committed' THEN p.Oppty ELSE 0 END) WHERE IN_PIPELINE = 1 and QTR_BKT_IND = 0

kpis.name: W+F+UC %
kpis.definition: Won + Forecast + Upside Committed as a percentage of bookings target (quota). Measures how close the outlook is to achieving quota for the quarter.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT IN ('Won','Forecast','Upside - Committed')) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL), 0) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0

components.numerator: W+F+UC $ (Won + Forecast + Upside Committed pipeline $)

kpis.formulaPbix: (SUM(Won Oppty) + SUM(Forecast Oppty) + SUM(Upside Committed Oppty)) / NULLIF(SUM(QUOTA_ACTUAL), 0) WHERE QTR_BKT_IND = 0

kpis.name: WON $
kpis.definition: Total dollar amount of deals with commitment status 'Won'. Uses the active commit type (ADJ_COMMITMENT by default, or MGR_ADJ_COMMIT / GEO_ADJ_COMMIT depending on role).
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY) WHERE vw_TF_EBI_P2S.ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Won'
kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(p.Oppty) WHERE p.ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Won' AND p.IN_PIPELINE = 1

kpis.name: FORECAST $
kpis.definition: Total dollar amount of deals with commitment status 'Forecast'. These are deals the rep/manager commits will close this quarter.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY) WHERE vw_TF_EBI_P2S.ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Forecast'
kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(p.Oppty) WHERE p.ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Forecast' AND p.IN_PIPELINE = 1

kpis.name: UPSIDE COMMITTED $
kpis.definition: Dollar amount of deals with commitment status 'Upside - Committed'. These are stretch deals that have a reasonable probability of closing this quarter.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY) WHERE vw_TF_EBI_P2S.ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Upside - Committed'
kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(p.Oppty) WHERE p.ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Upside - Committed' AND p.IN_PIPELINE = 1

kpis.name: Gap to Plan $
kpis.definition: Dollar gap between bookings target (quota) and current W+F+UC outlook. Positive = still below target; negative = exceeding target.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL) - SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT IN ('Won','Forecast','Upside - Committed')) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0
kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(q.QUOTA_ACTUAL) - (SUM(Won Oppty) + SUM(Forecast Oppty) + SUM(Upside Committed Oppty)) WHERE QTR_BKT_IND = 0

kpis.name: LINEARITY GAP $
kpis.definition: Gap between actual won bookings and the linearity target for the current week within the quarter. Shows whether bookings are on pace with the expected weekly trajectory.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Won') - (SUM(vw_EBI_PACING_TARGET.PACING_LINEARITY) * SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL))

components.LINEARITY TARGET $: Expected cumulative won bookings by this week = PACING_LINEARITY * BOOKINGS TARGET

kpis.formulaPbix: WON $ - LINEARITY TARGET $ (where LINEARITY TARGET = SUM(vw_EBI_PACING_TARGET.PACING_LINEARITY) * BOOKINGS TARGET)

kpis.name: LINEARITY TARGET $
kpis.definition: Expected cumulative bookings by the current week in the quarter, based on pacing targets. Calculated as pacing linearity percentage times the bookings target.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_EBI_PACING_TARGET.PACING_LINEARITY) * SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL)
kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(vw_EBI_PACING_TARGET.PACING_LINEARITY) * SUM(q.QUOTA_ACTUAL)

kpis.name: PULLED IN $
kpis.definition: Dollar amount of deals pulled into the current quarter from future quarters, sourced from pipe walk data. Indicates pipeline acceleration.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_PIPE_WALK.GROSSASV) WHERE vw_TF_EBI_PIPE_WALK.WALK_GROUP = 'Pulled In' AND vw_TF_EBI_PIPE_WALK.PIPE_FLAG = 'Pipe'
kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(pw.GROSSASV) WHERE pw.WALK_GROUP = 'Pulled In' AND pw.PIPE_FLAG = 'Pipe'

kpis.name: PUSHED OUT $
kpis.definition: Dollar amount of deals pushed out from the current quarter to future quarters, from pipe walk data. Indicates pipeline slippage risk.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_PIPE_WALK.GROSSASV) WHERE vw_TF_EBI_PIPE_WALK.WALK_GROUP = 'Pushed' AND vw_TF_EBI_PIPE_WALK.PIPE_FLAG = 'Pipe'
kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(pw.GROSSASV) WHERE pw.WALK_GROUP = 'Pushed' AND pw.PIPE_FLAG = 'Pipe'

kpis.name: NET CHANGE $
kpis.definition: Net change in pipeline dollar value since beginning of quarter. Current pipe minus BOQ pipe. Positive = pipeline grew; negative = pipeline shrank.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE IN_PIPELINE = 1) - SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE IS_BOQ = 'TRUE' AND IN_PIPELINE = 1)
kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(p.Oppty WHERE IN_PIPELINE = 1) - SUM(p.Oppty WHERE IS_BOQ = 'TRUE' AND IN_PIPELINE = 1)

kpis.name: W+F+UC Stalled %
kpis.definition: Percentage of forecast pipeline (S3/S4/S5+) that is stalled and inactive. High values indicate risk in the outlook as stalled deals may not close on time.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE STALLED_BUT_INACTIVE = 'Stalled & Inactive' AND vw_EBI_SALES_STAGE.SalesStageGrp IN ('S3','S4','S5+')) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE vw_EBI_SALES_STAGE.SalesStageGrp IN ('S3','S4','S5+')), 0)

components.numerator: Stalled pipeline $ in S3/S4/S5+ stages

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(Oppty WHERE STALLED_BUT_INACTIVE = 'Stalled & Inactive' AND SalesStageGrp IN ('S3','S4','S5+')) / NULLIF(SUM(Oppty WHERE SalesStageGrp IN ('S3','S4','S5+')), 0)

kpis.name: MANAGER FORECAST CQ %
kpis.definition: Manager-level forecast attainment for the current quarter. Calculated as W+F+UC % filtered to close quarter = CQ and latest snapshot week.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT IN ('Won','Forecast','Upside - Committed')) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL), 0) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0 AND vw_EBI_Caldate.WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = 0

components.numerator: W+F+UC $ for CQ at latest snapshot

kpis.formulaPbix: (SUM(Won + Forecast + Upside Committed Oppty) / NULLIF(SUM(QUOTA_ACTUAL), 0)) WHERE QTR_BKT_IND = 0 AND WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = 0

kpis.name: MANAGER FORECAST YTD %
kpis.definition: Manager-level forecast attainment year-to-date. Alias for W+F+UC YTD %, which is (W+F+UC PIPE YTD $) / (BOOKINGS TARGET YTD).
kpis.formula: (PQ Won $ at EOQ + CQ W+F+UC $) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.FISCAL_YR = current AND QTR_BKT_IND <= 0), 0)

components.numerator: W+F+UC PIPE YTD $ = PQ won (at EOQ) + CQ won + CQ forecast + CQ upside committed
components.denominator: BOOKINGS TARGET YTD = SUM(QUOTA_ACTUAL) for all quarters in current fiscal year up to CQ

kpis.formulaPbix: (PQ Won $ + CQ Won $ + CQ Forecast $ + CQ Upside Committed $) / NULLIF(SUM(QUOTA_ACTUAL WHERE FISCAL_YR = current AND QTR_BKT_IND <= 0), 0)

kpis.name: WON ATTAINMENT %
kpis.definition: Won bookings as a percentage of the bookings target (quota). Measures actual closed deal performance against target.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Won') / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL), 0)

components.numerator: WON $ (won deal pipeline amount)

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(Oppty WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Won') / NULLIF(SUM(QUOTA_ACTUAL), 0)

kpis.name: PERFORMANCE YTD %
kpis.definition: Year-to-date W+F+UC pipeline as a percentage of YTD bookings target. Measures how the outlook tracks against the annual plan so far.
kpis.formula: (PQ Won at EOQ + CQ W+F+UC) / NULLIF(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.QUOTA_ACTUAL YTD), 0)

components.numerator: W+F+UC PIPE YTD $ (PQ won at EOQ + CQ won + CQ forecast + CQ upside committed)
components.denominator: BOOKINGS TARGET YTD (quota summed for current fiscal year through CQ)

kpis.formulaPbix: W+F+UC PIPE YTD $ / NULLIF(BOOKINGS TARGET YTD, 0)

kpis.name: Account Red & Yellow %
kpis.definition: Percentage of child accounts with ARR > 0 that have Red or Yellow customer health status. Indicates the proportion of the account base at risk.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ACCOUNT_ID WHERE CUSTOMER_HEALTH IN ('Red','Yellow') AND BOQ_ARR > 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT ACCOUNT_ID WHERE BOQ_ARR > 0), 0) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0

components.numerator: Count of Red + Yellow health accounts with ARR > 0

kpis.formulaPbix: (COUNT(DISTINCT ACCOUNT_ID WHERE CUSTOMER_HEALTH IN ('Red','Yellow') AND BOQ_ARR > 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT ACCOUNT_ID WHERE BOQ_ARR > 0), 0)) for QTR_BKT_IND = 0

kpis.name: Account Red & Yellow #
kpis.definition: Count of account-solution combinations with Red or Yellow customer health status. Represents the number of at-risk account solutions.
kpis.formula: COUNT(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ACCOUNT_ID WHERE CUSTOMER_HEALTH = 'Red' AND BOQ_ARR > 0) + COUNT(WHERE CUSTOMER_HEALTH = 'Yellow' AND BOQ_ARR > 0) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0
kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(Red health accounts) + COUNT(Yellow health accounts) WHERE BOQ_ARR > 0 for QTR_BKT_IND = 0

kpis.name: CQ Acc ARR Red
kpis.definition: Beginning-of-quarter ARR for accounts with Red customer health status in the current quarter.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.BOQ_ARR) WHERE CUSTOMER_HEALTH = 'Red' AND vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0
kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(BOQ_ARR) WHERE CUSTOMER_HEALTH = 'Red' AND QTR_BKT_IND = 0

kpis.name: CQ Acc ARR Yellow
kpis.definition: Beginning-of-quarter ARR for accounts with Yellow customer health status in the current quarter.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.BOQ_ARR) WHERE CUSTOMER_HEALTH = 'Yellow' AND vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0
kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(BOQ_ARR) WHERE CUSTOMER_HEALTH = 'Yellow' AND QTR_BKT_IND = 0

kpis.name: CQ Acc ARR Green
kpis.definition: Beginning-of-quarter ARR for accounts with Green customer health status in the current quarter.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.BOQ_ARR) WHERE CUSTOMER_HEALTH = 'Green' AND vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0
kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(BOQ_ARR) WHERE CUSTOMER_HEALTH = 'Green' AND QTR_BKT_IND = 0

kpis.name: CQ Sol ARR Red
kpis.definition: Beginning-of-quarter ARR for solutions with Red customer solution health status in the current quarter.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.BOQ_ARR) WHERE CUSTOMER_SOLUTION_HEALTH = 'Red' AND vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0
kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(BOQ_ARR) WHERE CUSTOMER_SOLUTION_HEALTH = 'Red' AND QTR_BKT_IND = 0

kpis.name: CQ Sol ARR Yellow
kpis.definition: Beginning-of-quarter ARR for solutions with Yellow customer solution health status in the current quarter.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.BOQ_ARR) WHERE CUSTOMER_SOLUTION_HEALTH = 'Yellow' AND vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0
kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(BOQ_ARR) WHERE CUSTOMER_SOLUTION_HEALTH = 'Yellow' AND QTR_BKT_IND = 0

kpis.name: CQ Sol ARR Green
kpis.definition: Beginning-of-quarter ARR for solutions with Green customer solution health status in the current quarter.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.BOQ_ARR) WHERE CUSTOMER_SOLUTION_HEALTH = 'Green' AND vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0
kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(BOQ_ARR) WHERE CUSTOMER_SOLUTION_HEALTH = 'Green' AND QTR_BKT_IND = 0

kpis.name: Accnt Movement Up
kpis.definition: Count of distinct accounts whose health status improved (moved up) in the current month. Uses Customer Health Movement data filtered to Trending Up.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TF_EBI_CUSTOMER_HEALTH_MOVEMENT.ACCOUNT_ID) WHERE vw_TD_EBI_HEALTH_MOVEMENT.HEALTH_MOVEMENT_TYPE = 'Trending Up' AND HAVE_ACTIVE_PQ_EOQ_ARR = 1

components.ACCOUNT_ID: Distinct account count from Customer Health Movement

kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT chm.ACCOUNT_ID) WHERE chm.SNAPSHOT_MONTH_ID = current_month AND hm.HEALTH_MOVEMENT_TYPE = 'Trending Up' AND HAVE_ACTIVE_PQ_EOQ_ARR = 1
kpis.notes: dataset:Customer_Health_Movement — uses vw_TF_EBI_CUSTOMER_HEALTH_MOVEMENT

kpis.name: Accnt Movement Down
kpis.definition: Count of distinct accounts whose health status declined (moved down) in the current month. Uses Customer Health Movement data filtered to Trending Down.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TF_EBI_CUSTOMER_HEALTH_MOVEMENT.ACCOUNT_ID) WHERE vw_TD_EBI_HEALTH_MOVEMENT.HEALTH_MOVEMENT_TYPE = 'Trending Down' AND HAVE_ACTIVE_PQ_EOQ_ARR = 1

components.ACCOUNT_ID: Distinct account count from Customer Health Movement

kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT chm.ACCOUNT_ID) WHERE chm.SNAPSHOT_MONTH_ID = current_month AND hm.HEALTH_MOVEMENT_TYPE = 'Trending Down' AND HAVE_ACTIVE_PQ_EOQ_ARR = 1
kpis.notes: dataset:Customer_Health_Movement — uses vw_TF_EBI_CUSTOMER_HEALTH_MOVEMENT

kpis.name: Sol Movement Up
kpis.definition: Count of distinct account-solution combinations whose solution health status improved in the current month.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TF_EBI_CUSTOMER_SOLUTION_HEALTH_MOVEMENT.acc_sol_key) WHERE vw_TD_EBI_HEALTH_MOVEMENT.HEALTH_MOVEMENT_TYPE = 'Trending Up' AND HAVE_ACTIVE_PQ_EOQ_ARR = 1

components.acc_sol_key: Account-solution composite key from Customer Solution Health Movement

kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT cshm.acc_sol_key) WHERE cshm.SNAPSHOT_MONTH_ID = current_month AND hm.HEALTH_MOVEMENT_TYPE = 'Trending Up' AND HAVE_ACTIVE_PQ_EOQ_ARR = 1
kpis.notes: dataset:Customer_Health_Movement — uses vw_TF_EBI_CUSTOMER_SOLUTION_HEALTH_MOVEMENT

kpis.name: Sol Movement Down
kpis.definition: Count of distinct account-solution combinations whose solution health status declined in the current month.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TF_EBI_CUSTOMER_SOLUTION_HEALTH_MOVEMENT.acc_sol_key) WHERE vw_TD_EBI_HEALTH_MOVEMENT.HEALTH_MOVEMENT_TYPE = 'Trending Down' AND HAVE_ACTIVE_PQ_EOQ_ARR = 1
kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT cshm.acc_sol_key) WHERE cshm.SNAPSHOT_MONTH_ID = current_month AND hm.HEALTH_MOVEMENT_TYPE = 'Trending Down' AND HAVE_ACTIVE_PQ_EOQ_ARR = 1
kpis.notes: dataset:Customer_Health_Movement — uses vw_TF_EBI_CUSTOMER_SOLUTION_HEALTH_MOVEMENT

kpis.name: FP Risk CQ
kpis.definition: Focal point additional risk amount for the current quarter. Represents incremental risk to retention beyond normal attrition, excluding deal-type and creator-type breakdowns.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RISK_UPSIDE_AMOUNT) WHERE risk_type = 'Additional Risks' AND vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0

components.Additional Risks: Risk amount from retention/focal point data

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(RISK_UPSIDE_AMOUNT) WHERE QTR_BKT_IND = 0 AND risk_type = 'Additional Risks' (aggregate level only, blanked when sliced by Creator Type or Deal Type)

kpis.name: FP Upside Savables CQ
kpis.definition: Focal point savable amount for the current quarter. Represents potential retention upside from at-risk accounts that could be saved, excluding deal-type and creator-type breakdowns.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RISK_UPSIDE_AMOUNT WHERE RISK_UPSIDE_AMOUNT > 0) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0

components.Savables: Savable retention amount from focal point data

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(Savables amount) WHERE QTR_BKT_IND = 0 (aggregate level only, blanked when sliced by Creator Type or Deal Type)

kpis.name: Non-Compliant Account Count
kpis.definition: Count of accounts where customer health has not been updated within the compliance window. Red accounts: >14 days since update, Yellow: >30 days, Green: >90 days. Based on DAYS_SINCE_ACCNT_HEALTH_MODIFED column.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TF_EBI_Retention.ACCOUNT_ID WHERE (CUSTOMER_HEALTH='Red' AND DAYS_SINCE_ACCNT_HEALTH_MODIFED > 14) OR (CUSTOMER_HEALTH='Yellow' AND DAYS_SINCE_ACCNT_HEALTH_MODIFED > 30) OR (CUSTOMER_HEALTH='Green' AND DAYS_SINCE_ACCNT_HEALTH_MODIFED > 90)) WHERE BOQ_ARR > 0 AND vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = -1
kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT ACCOUNT_ID WHERE (CUSTOMER_HEALTH='Red' AND DAYS_SINCE_ACCNT_HEALTH_MODIFED > 14) OR (CUSTOMER_HEALTH='Yellow' AND DAYS_SINCE_ACCNT_HEALTH_MODIFED > 30) OR (CUSTOMER_HEALTH='Green' AND DAYS_SINCE_ACCNT_HEALTH_MODIFED > 90)) WHERE ARR > 0 AND QTR_BKT_IND = -1

kpis.name: Non-Compliant Solution Count
kpis.definition: Count of account-solution combinations where solution health has not been updated within the compliance window. Red: >14 days, Yellow: >30 days, Green: >90 days. Based on DAYS_SINCE_SOL_HEALTH_MODIFED column.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT acc_sol_key WHERE (CUSTOMER_SOLUTION_HEALTH='Red' AND DAYS_SINCE_SOL_HEALTH_MODIFED > 14) OR (CUSTOMER_SOLUTION_HEALTH='Yellow' AND DAYS_SINCE_SOL_HEALTH_MODIFED > 30) OR (CUSTOMER_SOLUTION_HEALTH='Green' AND DAYS_SINCE_SOL_HEALTH_MODIFED > 90)) WHERE BOQ_ARR > 0 AND vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = -1
kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT acc_sol_key WHERE (CUSTOMER_SOLUTION_HEALTH='Red' AND DAYS_SINCE_SOL_HEALTH_MODIFED > 14) OR (CUSTOMER_SOLUTION_HEALTH='Yellow' AND DAYS_SINCE_SOL_HEALTH_MODIFED > 30) OR (CUSTOMER_SOLUTION_HEALTH='Green' AND DAYS_SINCE_SOL_HEALTH_MODIFED > 90)) WHERE ARR > 0 AND QTR_BKT_IND = -1

kpis.name: AE PART @75% QTD %
kpis.definition: Percentage of AEs in seat achieving >= 75% of their CQ manager forecast target QTD. Measures team-level booking participation across the AE population.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.REP_LDAP WHERE MANAGER_FORECAST_CQ >= 0.75 AND IS_TRUE_REP = 1 AND REP_IN_PLACE = 'In Place' AND AT_EMP_STATUS = 'Active') / NULLIF(COUNT(AE_IN_SEAT), 0)

components.numerator: AEs with CQ manager forecast >= 75%
components.denominator: AE IN SEAT (active, in-place, true reps with quota)

kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT REP_LDAP WHERE MANAGER_FORECAST_CQ_PCT >= 0.75 AND IS_TRUE_REP = 1 AND REP_IN_PLACE = 'In Place' AND AT_EMP_STATUS = 'Active') / NULLIF(COUNT(AE IN SEAT), 0)

kpis.name: AE PART @75% YTD %
kpis.definition: Percentage of AEs in seat achieving >= 75% of their YTD projection target. Measures year-level booking participation across the AE population.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.REP_LDAP WHERE YTD_PROJECTION >= 0.75 AND IS_TRUE_REP = 1 AND REP_IN_PLACE = 'In Place' AND AT_EMP_STATUS = 'Active') / NULLIF(COUNT(AE_IN_SEAT), 0)

components.numerator: AEs with YTD projection >= 75%
components.denominator: AE IN SEAT (active, in-place, true reps with quota)

kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT REP_LDAP WHERE YTD_PROJECTION_PCT >= 0.75 AND IS_TRUE_REP = 1 AND REP_IN_PLACE = 'In Place' AND AT_EMP_STATUS = 'Active') / NULLIF(COUNT(AE IN SEAT), 0)

kpis.name: REP PARTICIPATION CQ >75 %
kpis.definition: Percentage of reps achieving >= 75% of CQ manager forecast. Counts reps at REP_LDAP level with MANAGER FORECAST CQ % >= 0.75, divided by total reps.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.REP_LDAP WHERE MANAGER_FORECAST_CQ >= 0.75 AND IS_TRUE_REP = 1) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT REP_LDAP WHERE IS_TRUE_REP = 1), 0)

components.numerator: Reps with CQ manager forecast >= 75%

kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT REP_LDAP WHERE MANAGER_FORECAST_CQ_PCT >= 0.75 AND IS_TRUE_REP = 1) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT REP_LDAP WHERE IS_TRUE_REP = 1), 0)

kpis.name: REP PARTICIPATION YTD >75 %
kpis.definition: Percentage of reps achieving >= 75% of YTD manager forecast. Counts reps with MANAGER FORECAST YTD % >= 0.75, divided by total reps.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.REP_LDAP WHERE MANAGER_FORECAST_YTD >= 0.75 AND IS_TRUE_REP = 1) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT REP_LDAP WHERE IS_TRUE_REP = 1), 0)

components.numerator: Reps with YTD manager forecast >= 75%

kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT REP_LDAP WHERE MANAGER_FORECAST_YTD_PCT >= 0.75 AND IS_TRUE_REP = 1) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT REP_LDAP WHERE IS_TRUE_REP = 1), 0)

kpis.name: FLM PARTICIPATION CQ >75 %
kpis.definition: Percentage of FLMs achieving >= 75% of CQ manager forecast. Counts FLMs at FLM_LDAP level with MANAGER FORECAST CQ % >= 0.75, divided by total FLMs.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.FLM_LDAP WHERE MANAGER_FORECAST_CQ >= 0.75 AND IS_TRUE_FLM = 1) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT FLM_LDAP WHERE IS_TRUE_FLM = 1), 0)

components.numerator: FLMs with CQ manager forecast >= 75%

kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT FLM_LDAP WHERE MANAGER_FORECAST_CQ_PCT >= 0.75 AND IS_TRUE_FLM = 1) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT FLM_LDAP WHERE IS_TRUE_FLM = 1), 0)

kpis.name: FLM PARTICIPATION YTD >75 %
kpis.definition: Percentage of FLMs achieving >= 75% of YTD manager forecast. Counts FLMs with MANAGER FORECAST YTD % >= 0.75, divided by total FLMs.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.FLM_LDAP WHERE MANAGER_FORECAST_YTD >= 0.75 AND IS_TRUE_FLM = 1) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT FLM_LDAP WHERE IS_TRUE_FLM = 1), 0)

components.numerator: FLMs with YTD manager forecast >= 75%

kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT FLM_LDAP WHERE MANAGER_FORECAST_YTD_PCT >= 0.75 AND IS_TRUE_FLM = 1) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT FLM_LDAP WHERE IS_TRUE_FLM = 1), 0)

kpis.name: FLM WITH >50% AE @75% QTD %
aliases: FLM with majority AE participation QTD
kpis.definition: Percentage of FLMs where >50% of their AEs achieve >= 75% CQ manager forecast QTD. Measures whether FLM teams have broad-based participation rather than reliance on a few top performers.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.FLM_LDAP WHERE (AEs_at_75/Total_AEs) >= 0.5 AND IS_TRUE_FLM = 1) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT FLM_LDAP WHERE IS_TRUE_FLM = 1), 0)

components.numerator: FLMs where FLM COUNT > 75 CQ CW % >= 50%

kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT FLM_LDAP WHERE (AEs_at_75pct / Total_AEs) >= 0.5 AND IS_TRUE_FLM = 1) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT FLM_LDAP WHERE IS_TRUE_FLM = 1), 0)

kpis.name: AE IN SEAT
kpis.definition: Count of active AEs currently in seat with quota. Filters: IS_TRUE_REP = 1, REP_IN_PLACE = 'In Place', AT_EMP_STATUS = 'Active', IS_CYQUOTA_AVAILABLE = TRUE, AREA IN ('DX','DX/DME').
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.REP_LDAP) WHERE IS_TRUE_REP = 1 AND REP_IN_PLACE = 'In Place' AND AT_EMP_STATUS = 'Active' AND IS_CYQUOTA_AVAILABLE = 1 AND AREA IN ('DX','DX/DME')
kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT REP_LDAP) WHERE IS_TRUE_REP = 1 AND REP_IN_PLACE = 'In Place' AND AT_EMP_STATUS = 'Active' AND IS_CYQUOTA_AVAILABLE = 1 AND AREA IN ('DX','DX/DME')

kpis.name: AE TOTAL
kpis.definition: Total count of active true reps with quota availability. Filters: IS_TRUE_REP = 1, AT_EMP_STATUS = 'Active', IS_CYQUOTA_AVAILABLE = TRUE, AREA IN ('DX','DX/DME'). Includes both in-place and not-in-place.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.REP_LDAP) WHERE IS_TRUE_REP = 1 AND AT_EMP_STATUS = 'Active' AND IS_CYQUOTA_AVAILABLE = 1 AND AREA IN ('DX','DX/DME')
kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT REP_LDAP) WHERE IS_TRUE_REP = 1 AND AT_EMP_STATUS = 'Active' AND IS_CYQUOTA_AVAILABLE = 1 AND AREA IN ('DX','DX/DME')

kpis.name: FP AE Total
kpis.definition: Total AE count filtered to only reps with quota (REGION_ID in Quota table). Focal point view of AE headcount that only includes reps assigned to quota territories.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.REP_LDAP) WHERE IS_TRUE_REP = 1 AND AT_EMP_STATUS = 'Active' AND IS_CYQUOTA_AVAILABLE = 1 AND REGION_ID IN (SELECT REGION_ID FROM vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA)

components.Quota filter: Only reps whose REGION_ID appears in the Quota table

kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT REP_LDAP) WHERE IS_TRUE_REP = 1 AND AT_EMP_STATUS = 'Active' AND IS_CYQUOTA_AVAILABLE = 1 AND AREA IN ('DX','DX/DME') AND REGION_ID IN (SELECT REGION_ID FROM vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA)

kpis.name: FP AE in seat
kpis.definition: AEs in seat filtered to only reps with quota (REGION_ID in Quota table). Focal point view of in-place AE headcount.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.REP_LDAP) WHERE IS_TRUE_REP = 1 AND REP_IN_PLACE = 'In Place' AND AT_EMP_STATUS = 'Active' AND IS_CYQUOTA_AVAILABLE = 1 AND REGION_ID IN (SELECT REGION_ID FROM vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA)

components.Quota filter: Only reps whose REGION_ID appears in the Quota table

kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT REP_LDAP) WHERE IS_TRUE_REP = 1 AND REP_IN_PLACE = 'In Place' AND AT_EMP_STATUS = 'Active' AND IS_CYQUOTA_AVAILABLE = 1 AND AREA IN ('DX','DX/DME') AND REGION_ID IN (SELECT REGION_ID FROM vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA)

kpis.name: FLM PARTICIPATION TOTAL FLM #
kpis.definition: Total count of distinct FLMs (First Level Managers) with IS_TRUE_FLM = 1. Used as denominator for FLM participation calculations.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.FLM_LDAP) WHERE IS_TRUE_FLM = 1
kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT FLM_LDAP) WHERE IS_TRUE_FLM = 1

kpis.name: FLM COUNT > 75 CQ CW %
kpis.definition: Per-FLM metric: percentage of a specific FLM's reps achieving >= 75% CQ manager forecast. Used to assess whether a manager's team has broad participation.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.REP_LDAP WHERE MANAGER_FORECAST_CQ >= 0.75 AND IS_TRUE_REP = 1 under FLM) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT REP_LDAP WHERE IS_TRUE_REP = 1 under FLM), 0)

components.numerator: Reps under FLM with CQ manager forecast >= 75%
components.denominator: Total true reps under the FLM

kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT REP_LDAP WHERE MANAGER_FORECAST_CQ_PCT >= 0.75 AND IS_TRUE_REP = 1 under FLM) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT REP_LDAP WHERE IS_TRUE_REP = 1 under FLM), 0)

kpis.name: FLM COUNT > 75 YTD CW %
kpis.definition: Per-FLM metric: percentage of a specific FLM's reps achieving >= 75% YTD projection. Used to assess year-level participation breadth within a manager's team.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_REGION_RPT_MASKED.REP_LDAP WHERE YTD_PROJECTION >= 0.75 AND IS_TRUE_REP = 1 under FLM) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT REP_LDAP WHERE IS_TRUE_REP = 1 under FLM), 0)

components.numerator: Reps under FLM with YTD projection >= 75%
components.denominator: Total true reps under the FLM

kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT REP_LDAP WHERE YTD_PROJECTION_PCT >= 0.75 AND IS_TRUE_REP = 1 under FLM) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT REP_LDAP WHERE IS_TRUE_REP = 1 under FLM), 0)

kpis.name: ASV WIN RATE %
kpis.definition: ASV (Annual Subscription Value) win rate: won dollar amount divided by total resolved (won + lost) dollar amount. Measures deal conversion effectiveness.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Won') / NULLIF(SUM(OPPTY WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Won') + SUM(OPPTY WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Lost'), 0)

components.numerator: WON $ (won pipeline amount)

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(Oppty WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Won') / NULLIF(SUM(Oppty WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Won') + SUM(Oppty WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Lost'), 0)

kpis.name: FORECAST ACCURACY PQ %
kpis.definition: Forecast accuracy for the previous quarter. BOQ forecast (S3/S4/S5+/Booked) divided by actual EOQ won (S3/S4/S5+/Booked) for PQ. Measures how well the team predicted outcomes.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Forecast' AND IS_BOQ = 'TRUE' AND vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = -1) / NULLIF(SUM(OPPTY WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Won' AND IS_EOQ = 'TRUE' AND QTR_BKT_IND = -1), 0)

components.numerator: PQ BOQ Forecast $ in S3/S4/S5+/Booked stages
components.denominator: PQ EOQ Won $ in S3/S4/S5+/Booked stages

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(Oppty WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Forecast' AND IS_BOQ = 'TRUE' AND SalesStageGrp IN ('S3','S4','S5+','Booked') AND QTR_BKT_IND = -1) / NULLIF(SUM(Oppty WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Won' AND IS_EOQ = 'TRUE' AND SalesStageGrp IN ('S3','S4','S5+','Booked') AND QTR_BKT_IND = -1), 0)

kpis.name: BOQ ARR $
kpis.definition: Beginning-of-quarter ARR. For the current quarter (QTR_BKT_IND=0), it is the raw BOQ_ARR. For future quarters, it projects forward by adding W+F+UC $ and ARR IMPACT from prior quarter buckets.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.BOQ_ARR) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0; for Q+N: BOQ_ARR_Q0 + cumulative (W+F+UC + ARR_IMPACT)

components.adjustments: W+F+UC $ + ARR IMPACT per quarter bucket

kpis.formulaPbix: For CQ: SUM(arr.BOQ_ARR) WHERE cal.QTR_BKT_IND = 0. For Q+1: BOQ_ARR_Q0 + (W+F+UC $ + ARR_IMPACT) for Q0. Fallback: SUM(arr.BOQ_ARR)
kpis.notes: For Q+N projections, forward-computes BOQ_ARR + cumulative (W+F+UC + ARR_IMPACT)

kpis.name: EOQ ARR $
kpis.definition: End-of-quarter ARR. Computed by adding cumulative W+F+UC $ and ARR IMPACT to BOQ_ARR across selected quarter buckets. Falls back to EOQ_ARR column if the computed value is blank/zero.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.BOQ_ARR) + SUM(W+F+UC + ARR_IMPACT) across selected vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND buckets; fallback: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.EOQ_ARR)

components.cumulative_impact: W+F+UC $ + ARR IMPACT summed across quarter buckets 0..N

kpis.formulaPbix: BOQ_ARR_Q0 + SUM(W+F+UC $ + ARR_IMPACT) across selected QTR_BKT_IND buckets. Fallback: SUM(arr.EOQ_ARR)
kpis.notes: Computed measure; falls back to EOQ_ARR column if computed value is blank

kpis.name: ARRAVG QoQ
kpis.definition: ARR average quarter-over-quarter trend. Shows BOQ ARR $ with reporting hierarchy filter removed to allow cross-hierarchy comparison.
kpis.formula: BOQ_ARR removing VW_TD_EBI_REPORTING_HIERARCHY.IS_CY_RPT_HIER filter for cross-hierarchy comparison

components.value: BOQ ARR $ across all reporting hierarchies

kpis.formulaPbix: CALCULATE(BOQ ARR $, removing IS_CY_RPT_HIER filter from VW_TD_EBI_REPORTING_HIERARCHY)
kpis.notes: Removes IS_CY_RPT_HIER filter from VW_TD_EBI_REPORTING_HIERARCHY for cross-hierarchy view

kpis.name: Sub MA ARR
