kpis.definition: Sub-account and MA-level ARR. Computes the account-level ARRAVG (Accnts CQ ARRAVG) with the MOPG1 product filter removed, giving total ARR irrespective of product grouping.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.EOQ_ARR) WHERE vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = -1, removing vw_EBI_OPG.MOPG1 filter

components.value: Accnts CQ ARRAVG with MOPG1 filter removed

kpis.formulaPbix: CALCULATE(SUM(arr.EOQ_ARR) WHERE cal.QTR_BKT_IND = -1, ALL(OPG.MOPG1))
kpis.notes: Removes MOPG1 filter from vw_EBI_OPG for total ARR irrespective of product grouping

kpis.name: R4Q RBOB w/o PQ Trail
kpis.definition: Rolling 4-quarter Renewals Base of Business (RBOB) excluding PQ Trailing renewals. Sums RBOB across 4 consecutive quarter buckets (CQ through Q+3).
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB) WHERE vw_TD_EBI_Retention_MetaData.PIPELINE_RENEWAL <> 'PQ Trailing' AND vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND IN (0,1,2,3)

components.value: RBOB across 4 quarter buckets excluding PQ Trailing renewals

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(ret.RBOB) WHERE ret_md.PIPELINE_RENEWAL <> 'PQ Trailing' AND cal.QTR_BKT_IND IN (0,1,2,3), removing IS_LATEST_SNAPSHOT and WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE filters

kpis.name: CW/PW RBOB w/o PQ Trail
kpis.definition: Current Week (CW) and Prior Week (PW) RBOB without PQ Trailing renewals. CW uses WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE=0 and PW uses WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE=-1, both filtered to CQ (QTR_BKT_IND=0). Used for week-over-week RBOB comparison.
kpis.formula: CW: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_Retention.RBOB) WHERE PIPELINE_RENEWAL <> 'PQ Trailing' AND vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0 AND WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = 0; PW: same with WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = -1

components.current_week: RBOB w/o PQ Trail at WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE=0, QTR_BKT_IND=0
components.prior_week: RBOB w/o PQ Trail at WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE=-1, QTR_BKT_IND=0, SNAPSHOT_TYPE=Locked

kpis.formulaPbix: CW: SUM(ret.RBOB) WHERE ret_md.PIPELINE_RENEWAL <> 'PQ Trailing' AND cal.QTR_BKT_IND = 0 AND cal.WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = '0'. PW: same but WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = '-1' with SNAPSHOT_TYPE = 'Locked'.

kpis.name: ASV $
kpis.definition: Annual Subscription Value — the pipeline opportunity amount filtered to the ASV pay measure. Represents the total ASV across pipeline deals.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY) WHERE vw_EBI_PAY_MEASURE.PAY_MEASURE_DISPLAY = 'ASV'

components.value: Pipeline Oppty filtered to ASV pay measure

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(p.Oppty) WHERE pm.PAY_MEASURE_DISPLAY = 'ASV'

kpis.name: OCC Deal Count
kpis.definition: Count of deals/opportunities in OCC. For past quarters (QTR_BKT_IND < 0), uses TM1 booked deal count. For current/future quarters, counts distinct DEAL_REG_IDs that have non-blank GNARR.
kpis.formula: IF vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND < 0: COUNT(DISTINCT TM1.OPP_ID WHERE TM1_Bookings > 0). ELSE: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TD_EBI_OPP.DEAL_REG_ID WHERE OPPTY IS NOT NULL)

components.historical: Distinct TM1 booked OPP_IDs with positive bookings

kpis.formulaPbix: IF QTR_BKT_IND < 0: COUNT(DISTINCT tm1.OPP_ID) WHERE TM1_Bookings > 0. ELSE: COUNT(DISTINCT opp.DEAL_REG_ID) WHERE GNARR is not null

kpis.name: Deal Sensei Score
kpis.definition: Deal health/intelligence score from the Deal Sensei model. A numeric score (DS_SCORE) assigned to each opportunity indicating deal health. Returns blank if no score exists.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TD_EBI_OPP.DS_SCORE)

components.value: DS_SCORE from Opportunity dimension

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(opp.DS_SCORE) — returns BLANK if null

kpis.name: Stage Duration
kpis.definition: Average number of days an opportunity has spent in its current sales stage. Used with CQ Risk Category to flag deals stalled too long (>=60 days = red flag for High/Low risk).
kpis.formula: AVG(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.STAGE_AGE)

components.value: STAGE_AGE from pipeline fact

kpis.formulaPbix: AVG(p.STAGE_AGE)

kpis.name: Opp Age
kpis.definition: Average total age of opportunities in days. Measures how long deals have been open from creation.
kpis.formula: AVG(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.DEAL_AGE)

components.value: DEAL_AGE from pipeline fact

kpis.formulaPbix: AVG(p.DEAL_AGE)

kpis.name: Stage Progression ASV
kpis.definition: ASV value of deals progressing through sales stages. Measures the gross ASV movement captured in the pipe walk table as deals advance or move between stages.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_PIPE_WALK.STAGEPROGRESSIONASV)

components.value: STAGEPROGRESSIONASV from pipe walk fact

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(pw.STAGEPROGRESSIONASV) from vw_TF_EBI_PIPE_WALK

kpis.name: ABS Walk Value
kpis.definition: Absolute value of pipeline walk. Measures the magnitude of pipeline change regardless of direction (positive or negative).
kpis.formula: ABS(SUM(vw_TF_EBI_PIPE_WALK.GROSSASV))

components.value: Absolute value of GROSSASV from pipe walk

kpis.formulaPbix: ABS(SUM(pw.GROSSASV)) — absolute value of WALK VALUE

kpis.name: CQ S3 to S4+ Progression %
kpis.definition: Percentage of S3 pipeline deals that have progressed to S4 or beyond in the current quarter. Measures stage advancement effectiveness for early-stage pipeline.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_PIPE_WALK.STAGEPROGRESSIONASV WHERE DAY_FLAG = 'QTD' AND PREV_SALES_STAGE_DERIVED IN ('S3','In Qtr') AND CURR_SALES_STAGE IN ('S4','S5','S6','S7','Booked')) / NULLIF(SUM(STAGEPROGRESSIONASV WHERE DAY_FLAG = 'QTD' AND PREV_SALES_STAGE_DERIVED IN ('S3','In Qtr')), 0)

components.numerator: Stage Progression ASV where prev stage is S3/In Qtr and current stage is S4+
components.denominator: Total Stage Progression ASV where prev stage is S3/In Qtr (QTD)

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(pw.STAGEPROGRESSIONASV WHERE pw.DAY_FLAG='QTD' AND pw.PREV_SALES_STAGE_DERIVED IN ('S3','In Qtr') AND pw.CURR_SALES_STAGE IN ('S4','S5','S6','S7','Booked')) / NULLIF(SUM(pw.STAGEPROGRESSIONASV WHERE pw.DAY_FLAG='QTD' AND pw.PREV_SALES_STAGE_DERIVED IN ('S3','In Qtr')), 0)

kpis.name: CQ S3/4 to S5+ Progression %
kpis.definition: Percentage of S3/S4 pipeline deals that have progressed to S5+ in the current quarter. Measures the maturation rate of mid-stage pipeline into commitment-ready deals.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_PIPE_WALK.STAGEPROGRESSIONASV WHERE PREV_SALES_STAGE_DERIVED IN ('S3','S4') AND CURR_SALES_STAGE IN ('S5','S6','S7','Booked')) / NULLIF(TRUE_PROGRESSION_QTD, 0)

components.numerator: S3/4 to S5+ progression dollar value

kpis.formulaPbix: CQ + N2Q S3/4 TO S5+ PROGRESSION $ / NULLIF(TRUE PROGRESSION QTD, 0)

kpis.name: Close Rate
kpis.definition: Pipeline close rate — ratio of won deals (from BOQ S3+ flag deals) to beginning-of-quarter pipeline. Measures how effectively the pipeline converts to wins.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE BOQ_S3_FLAG = 1 AND ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Won' AND vw_EBI_Caldate.QTR_BKT_IND = 0) / NULLIF(SUM(OPPTY WHERE IN_PIPELINE = 1 AND vw_EBI_Caldate.WEEKNUMBER = 'W1'), 0)

components.numerator: Won $ from BOQ S3+ deals in current quarter snapshot

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(p.Oppty WHERE p.BOQ_S3_Flag=1 AND p.ADJ_COMMITMENT='Won' AND cal.QTR_BKT_IND=0) / NULLIF(SUM(p.Oppty WHERE p.IN_PIPELINE=1 AND cal.WEEKNUMBER='W1'), 0)

kpis.name: Close Ratio
kpis.definition: Pipeline close ratio — ratio of won deals at end-of-quarter to beginning-of-quarter pipeline. Similar to close rate but uses EOQ won vs BOQ pipe snapshots.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT = 'Won' AND IS_EOQ = 'TRUE') / NULLIF(SUM(OPPTY WHERE IN_PIPELINE = 1 AND IS_BOQ = 'TRUE'), 0)

components.numerator: WON $ at EOQ

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(p.Oppty WHERE p.ADJ_COMMITMENT='Won' AND p.IS_EOQ='TRUE') / NULLIF(SUM(p.Oppty WHERE p.IN_PIPELINE=1 AND p.IS_BOQ='TRUE'), 0)

kpis.name: Idle Oppty %
kpis.definition: Percentage of open opportunities that are idle (30+ days since next steps were modified). Flags pipeline hygiene issues.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT_GROUP = 'Open' AND DAYS_SINCE_NEXT_STEPS_MODIFIED_BAND = '30+ days') / NULLIF(SUM(OPPTY WHERE ADJ_COMMITMENT_GROUP = 'Open'), 0)

components.numerator: Open oppty $ or # where DAYS_SINCE_NEXT_STEPS_MODIFIED_BAND = '30+ days'

kpis.formulaPbix: For $: SUM(p.Oppty WHERE p.ADJ_COMMITMENT_GROUP='Open' AND p.DAYS_SINCE_NEXT_STEPS_MODIFIED_BAND='30+ days') / NULLIF(SUM(p.Oppty WHERE p.ADJ_COMMITMENT_GROUP='Open'), 0). For #: same logic but with COUNT(DISTINCT p.OPP_ID).

kpis.name: Open Oppty #
kpis.definition: Count of open (non-closed) opportunities. Filtered to ADJ_COMMITMENT_GROUP = 'Open'.
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPP_ID) WHERE vw_TF_EBI_P2S.ADJ_COMMITMENT_GROUP = 'Open'

components.value: Distinct open opportunity IDs

kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(DISTINCT p.OPP_ID) WHERE p.ADJ_COMMITMENT_GROUP = 'Open'

kpis.name: Tier 1 Parent GNARR $
kpis.definition: GNARR (Gross Net ARR / pipeline opportunity $) for Tier 1 parent accounts. The total pipeline Oppty $ filtered to Tier 1 parent accounts.
kpis.formula: SUM(vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY) WHERE PARENT_TIER = 'Tier 1'

components.value: OPPTY $ filtered to Tier 1 parent tier

kpis.formulaPbix: SUM(p.Oppty) WHERE tpt_md.PARENT_TIER = 'Tier 1'

kpis.name: Tier 1 Parent Without GNARR #
kpis.definition: Count of Tier 1 parent accounts that have no pipeline (GNARR). Computed by finding all Tier 1 TPT parent-country combinations and subtracting those that have non-blank Oppty in the pipeline.
kpis.formula: COUNT(Tier 1 PRNT_CNTRY from TPT) - COUNT(Tier 1 ACCOUNT_PARENT_ID with non-null vw_TF_EBI_P2S.OPPTY at latest snapshot, ASV, DX)

components.parents_with_pipe: Distinct ACCOUNT_PARENT_ID with non-null Oppty, PARENT_TIER='Tier 1', latest snapshot, ASV, DX

kpis.formulaPbix: COUNT(Tier 1 TPT parents) - COUNT(Tier 1 parents with Oppty IS NOT NULL in Pipeline, filtered to latest snapshot, ASV, DX). Uses EXCEPT set operation.

kpis.definition: Account Activity # _SBR (filtered calculation)
kpis.formula: Power BI calculated measure — not directly queryable via SQL
kpis.formulaPbix:
CALCULATE(
    '_Account Activity Measures'[ACCOUNT ACTIVITY #],
    FILTER(
        'Account Activities Metadata',
        'Account Activities Metadata'[ACTIVITY_TYPE] = "SBR"
    ),
    ALL('OPG'[BU] /* DB: vw_EBI_OPG.BU */),
    ALL(OPG)
)

kpis.name: Exec_summary
kpis.definition: Exec_summary measure from Power BI ()
kpis.formula: Power BI calculated measure — not directly queryable via SQL
kpis.formulaPbix:
VAR SelectedAccount = SELECTEDVALUE('Account Activities Metadata'[ACTIVITY_KEY])
VAR SelectedSolution = SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunity[CREATED_BY])
RETURN
  IF(
    NOT(ISBLANK(SelectedAccount)) ,
    MIN('Account Activities Metadata'[EXEC_SUMMARY]),
    "Select a Row from the table to populate"
)
